I thought I wouldn’t like the razor back but it doesn’t bother me at all. The buttons don’t gap in the front which is really nice, and I bet it will look super cute with a shirt underneath! Right as I got it though, it went on sale - so definitely keep a look out for that 😭 otherwise a great vest! (I’m 5’6 & 175 lbs btw)

First, I have to say the material and quality is very high. I bought a size large based off the reviews. I am a size 10/12 and 34G boobs. The XL has at least a five inch gap on the side top and bottom. If it was the right size, I bet it would snatch you to the gods. As a big boob person, I am always worrying about shirts with buttons pulling at the chest , and I don’t think that would happen here at all. Buy it but size down!

These shorts will be great for someone that they actually fit. I went according to the size chart & got a small. Now I did expect them to be somewhat baggy on me which would’ve been fine but these are huge. They are soft & offer a wide selection of colors but the fit for me just isn’t there. These appear to be of nice quality & I’m sure they’ll look great on someone they fit. I can’t even attempt to pull this look off. Reference ~ I’m 5’ 96 lbs in a size small.

This skirt was purchased for my wife, who is 5 ft 3 in and 167 lbs, and the size Large fit her perfectly. She literally said it felt like it was made just for her. The denim feels very durable and well-made, not thin or cheap at all, but still comfortable thanks to the stretch. The high waist is flattering, and the raw hem gives it a nice casual look that can be dressed up or down. She absolutely loves this skirt and already said she wants it in multiple shades of denim. Definitely a great purchase and true to size.

LOVE the look and feel of this skirt! - It has 2% spandex but it feels like so much more. It has just the right amount of stretch. - I ordered my normal size LARGE and it fits great. I have 37” waist and 44” hips. I have a little bit of muffin top going on but it will be hidden by a shirt and it doesn’t feel too tight. ❌ Not a complaint but if it had built in shorts, that would bring this skirt over the top.

Very good quality and cute. I wasn’t sure it would be long enough for leggings, or if it would be decent material. But, I am impressed. I will buy this in more colors. Soft fleece inside, not too thick. I am 5’7 135 pounds and this is how it lays on me. I got a size large. Picture reviews always help me, especially with clothes so hopefully this can help you!! Definetly buy. It’s worth your $.

LOVE this. I am recently postpartum and was looking for something cozy and comfortable to wear. I love the hot pink color- it’s fun and looks like the color in the photo. Normally I am a small but I tried different sizes to see how the style would look (small, large and XL). I ended up staying with the XL because I really like it oversized and the length, can wear with leggings. I am 5’6 and right now weigh 146lbs. It is great quality, thick and I liked the proportions of this size best. Plus I feel like as I drop baby weight I will still be able to wear this! Highly recommend

This item is meant to be an oversized sweatshirt . I bought it in the color blue grey and color is just as pictured. I ordered a size small, I’m 5’3” and 115 lbs. the inside is lined and so soft. I also consider this a doop for the FP mock neck sweatshirt

5'4, 105 lbs, 40BSize top: LargeColor: BluegreenLooks more like a mint than a bluegreen, but it's still a pretty color. A very soft, lightweight, stretchy fabric that would be great for Spring/Summer. It's a little large for me, but I'll wear it around the house. I like oversized clothing. I'm gonna order a size Medium next. It's not made of cotton so I don't suppose it's going to shrink. Hasn't been washed yet, only tried on. This top is very long and goes well past my booty. It doesn't wrinkle, so that's a big plus and it might work well with some palazzo pants. Attached are the measurements for a size Large. I will order again, but in a Medium.I hope this helps customers :)

I like this shirt so far. It’s cute for business casual which is how I have to dress for work. It’s a little long but it’s okay if it’s tucked in. Only thing is if wearing a black compression tank top it’s a little see through. Shouldn’t be a problem with a beige one. I ordered a Large and I like how it fits on me. For reference I’m 5’3, 160-165lbs and carry most of my weight in my mid section. Haven’t washed it yet so I can’t speak to that yet. Overall I’m happy with the purchase 😌

Way too long! I’m 5’6 with a slim build and I ordered a size small. The shirt goes past the crotch of my pants and fully covers my butt. This would be good if you want to cover your butt with leggings but it’s not exactly the look I was hoping for. The other down side is that you can see my bra when I lift my arm because the arm hole is so wide.

Wish the side pocket were deeper, for my cell phone, and would prefer a zipper instead of a flap, and wish it was on the right side. I'm keeping them though because hard to find softer, not too wide, shorts, with a little stretch like these. I also wish they were an inch longer to better cover an unsightly blemish above my knee when I sit down, but oh well. The lighter pair were size XL , risky for my 5'3, 166lbs, but fit, maybe even better than the dark pair I got in XXL, at least until I wash them! I fold the flap in to allow for the cell phone. Might cut it off entirely or get creative& splice it on top of the pocket. I put my phone case in the pocket so you can see it's depth. Samsung S10+.

These Bermuda shorts fit true to size, which is nice, since there is another pair on Amazon that does not fit true to size. I ordered a size M, and I'm 5'5" and 112 lbs., with a waist of 30 1/2". These have some really nice stretch, and the size chart is accurate for the waist size. The waist can be too large or too small for me in size M's, but the stretch makes these fit perfectly. The color is a nice dark blue, and the length is great if you don't want really short shorts, but you don't want the weight and heat of longer capris in the summer. These will be great for quick errands, the beach or even to do some painting in your house. That seems to be what I always wear to paint something, lol. The side pockets are comfortable and I like the normal look of them in these Bermuda shorts. The cargo pockets are a nice addition for carrying notes or even flat, extra tissue. I would recommend these to anyone; they are very comfortable and versatile.
So soft, and comfy! I’m 5 Feet 6’, and followed the size chart. This is the apricot version, and it’s more like a cream, but I love it. Highly recommend!!

The fabric is super soft and cozy, like those old Gibson tops from Nordstrom — brushed, stretchy, and perfect for lounging or layering. It feels higher quality than I expected at this price. I’m a true petite (5’1”, 180 lbs, usually 16P/XLP/33P) and while the material is dreamy, the fit just wasn’t right for my body type. It’s a bit clingy around the mama edges (iykyk) and the sleeves run long. That said — if you’ve got a little more confidence (or a body that isn’t shaped like a postpartum power hour snack enthusiast), this one’s a no-brainer. The quality and comfort are chef’s kiss.

I’m a fan of this soft and cozy pullover that’s perfect for cooler weather. The polyester/rayon/spandex material has a wide rib design and “brushed” stretchy fabric. The top has a simple crew neckline and three angled button accents on the left and right. The buttons are for show only, ie, they don’t open. The sleeves have a 2-1/2” slightly fitted cuff to keep my wrists warm. As far as size, I ordered a Medium (5’4” – 125 lbs) and the fit is a bit loose so I can wear a cami or lighter top underneath. The sleeves are longish, creating a slight ballooning above the cuffs. The length is like a tunic, falling just below my hips. I really like this versatile top that I can wear on casual days or to dress up a nice pair of slacks or skirt for work.

I am 5’3” and about 150# athletic build usually a size 27 or 28 in jeans and got the medium in these and they fit perfectly - actually I am very pleasantly surprised how well they fit and how comfortable they are. I have a 25” inseam and these are also the perfect length for me. The barrel cut doesn’t look very barrely on me but I’m not sure if that is because of my build - I have large thighs and butt. I am happy with the cut though as I have tried some barrel jeans that are very circus-ish. These are a good in between. The denim quality is ok, I have some expensive jeans and the denim quality isn’t up there with those but for the price I didn’t expect it to be. The distressing is fun and works well. The shoelace belt thing is a bit ordinary so I may look to switch that out to elevate them a bit. Overall I am extremely happy with these for the price and feel like I will wear them a lot.
I didn’t like barrel jeans when they came out, since I am 5’4” I didn’t think they would look on me. I was wrong! They look fantastic! This ones are light weight and comfortable. Very chic and unique

I don’t know how to show this color for what it truly is. The photos in the ad are accurate. This is a beautiful shade. It isn’t yellow or dirty white. It’s like the perfect color of neutral you are looking for. The fit is oversized and I like it. The button size is accurate for the shirt and they are nice buttons that pair well with this shirt. The sleeves are almost proportionate to the oversized body. There may be something slightly off about this shirt. It may be the difference in the hem line between the front and the sides? Not sure. When I tuck it in sort way, I don’t love it as much as I do with another shirt I own of a similar style. Either way it’s worth the purchase and the material is nice, medium thickness, not see through, and a decent quality. I say go for it. I ordered the large and I am 36/38 C/158/5’2”

This is a great heavyweight corduroy shirt. This is the kind of shirt that takes me back to the '90s, and I love it. Keep in mind that this is BIG. I am five foot one and about 125 pounds and got the small. It is not overpowering, but if I had gotten a medium, I would be swimming in this. The arms are pretty long on me. Buttons all work as expected. It's super cozy, would make a great "shacket" in the south.

I tried on this corduroy oversized shirt hoping I could pull it off. I’m 5’2”, 130 lbs, and a mom of five, and I thought maybe—just maybe—it would magically make me look like all those Instagram models who rock these shirts. At first, I wilted. It wasn’t just oversized, it was HUGE. I despaired, because it’s such a cute style and I loved the color layered over a fitted black shirt with black jeans. But then… I uploaded my pictures, started writing this review, and actually LOOKED at them. And you know what? I can pull this off! It’s huge, comfy, trendy, and I’m loving it. It covers my behind and works perfectly with jeans, leggings, a fitted skirt—you name it. I'm keeping it and wearing it everywhere!

Have worn these out our wash’s then yet, but first try on they fit AMAZING. For reference, I’m 185lbs, 5’9 and bout an XL I was fully expecting them to be too short for my 32” inseam, but they hit perfectly to have about a 1-2” heeled shoe. The material is a bit more muted/matte with a slightly silver sheen. The pockets are somewhat small but still useable to carry things in.

I bought the Lover Premium Women’s Faux Leather Coated Flare Pants and while they were super cute, they were really long. I had to get 4 inches cut off just to wear them comfortably. For reference, I’m 155 lbs and purchased a size Medium, it fit perfectly! I wore them to a Shakira concert and felt like a total rockstar. If you’re on the shorter side, be ready for some hemming, but once tailored, these pants are fire!

These pants are super cute and comfortable. I spent all night bar hopping and dancing and they held up. I’m 5’6” and usually wear a small so that’s what I ordered. It fit great on my waist but oh my gosh were these long. I had to hem them and took off probably 3 inches. If you can sew or don’t mind a little chop job I think they’re worth it.
I’m 6ft 150 and these pants fit perfect and are long enough! Exactly as I expected.
I’m 5 foot 7, weigh about 160 lbs and got a size medium they fit great and are so cute!

Love them!!! Curvy girl friendly if you got a big bottom! I thought it was gonna be too tight but you gotta stretch into them for the first wear. They are stretchy! I can walk in these comfortably! No weird smell out the package or anything. Great material. Fits so nicely!!! Perfect length as well as I’m 5’6! Ignore messy room lol

I’m very pleased with this shirt. Its stylish and the perfect weight for layering—warm without feeling bulky or overheating, or perfect to wear by itself. The ribbed fabric is flowy, soft and comfortable against my skin, and the sleeves offer plenty of room for movement with an ideal arm length. The hem falls nicely and has a flattering fit. After washing, the fabric softened even more, which was a pleasant bonus. For reference, I’m 5'4", 164 lbs, and ordered a size large. It fits true to size. The shirt appears well made, with solid stitching that should hold up well over time. Overall, this shirt delivers excellent value for the price. Its versatility allows it to pair just as well with casual sweatpants as with more polished outfits. I would definitely recommend it.

The color is as shown. I ordered a large. It fits as expected. Loose. Fabric is soft. It is thin and a little see through. May work for layering. I am 162 lbs , 5'6", 38D. I haven't washed it so I dont know how it'll do with the washer and dryer. I gave it a 3 star because its not a high quality product but its nice Similar to Shein if you've ever purchased from them.

Definitely more of a low rise (perfect) a bit of a flair but not crazy, just enough to go over boots/shoes. Stretchy but not form fitting, comfortable. I’m 5’5 and they are a bit long even with a wedge but not enough that it takes any stars away!
These jeans are so comfortable and hold their shape. I took this picture after having them on for 10 hours of travel time. I ordered size 4 short. I am 5' 4" 130 lbs.

Love love love! Was worried this was going to be that thin cotton, no stretch material but it’s really great! Stretchy knit feel which makes it conform to you. I’m 5’7” 150 lbs and bought a medium and it fits perfect!

LOVE!! This top is super cute and flattering for a not-so-tiny figure, and probably the smaller or those more able to be athletic as well. I am 5'5", 159-162 lbs. I normally wear an L to an XL. I am technically a 38 in the bust, but when they say 40 for a size, I usually know to size up, atleast for a little room in the waist. So I got an Xl for that reason, but could have gotten by with an L, because it does fit loose. (I wasn't sure if it would have stretch) First, I love the bandana pattern I got! (Floral Red 870) Soo cute! (Also LOVE the v neck, believing its so much more flattering than rounded neck, atleast on me) Right out of the shrink wrapped package, the wrinkles pretty much fell away. Loved this about it too. I hung it for about an hour before the pics, but didn't really need to, I just had others that did need it) I am learning to use wider straps in tank tops, so that's still an issue for me thinking something is attractive for me, but I do like the shape and the hem at the bottom *the way it is rounded and comes up a bit at the sides*. I washed in warm (because I always do) and hung to dry. No wrinkles after, and no shrinkage. Ready to go when you are. Its a nice, soft material - not too thick or warm, but not see-thru thin either. I am going to have so much fun with this. Very happy, and I think its a good value, especially with the current coupon code.

Love! Only complaint is the roll up part on the bottom of the shorts constantly come undone, I’m having them sewn permanently. Other wise loved for my trip to New Orleans. I’m over 200 pounds and carry my weight in my belly and arms.

Sizing info first off: I'm 5'1" and weigh 125. I usually wear a 2 or a 4, or a Small, in bottoms. I ordered these overalls in a S and that seems to have been about right. I could probably fit into an XS to get it looking less baggy at the waist, but wouldn't get the overall slumpy look I was going for then. With that out of the way, let's go over some cons: my main complaint is that these are much shorter than I anticipated them being. That's not to say they're obscenely short or anything, but when I sit down I feel like these are Very Short. I'd guess these have maybe a 4" inseam? A second con is that the straps are...flimsy isn't quite the right word, as the fabric appears to be of a good thickness, but the length sliders don't move easily, and when they do, the fabric of the straps folds and clumps up, making adjusting the straps even harder. Now, some pros: the fabric seems to be real denim, not a polyester imitation, and has a good thickness to it. The stitching on the folded leg hems seems strong and more than adequate. These run true to size and the color I received matches the color in the listing. The hip pockets are real pockets, big enough to fit my phone, which in this day and age of fake pockets, is a big deal to me. Overall, if you don't mind a short inseam and somewhat annoying straps, these are a solid buy. I anticipate them lasting well.
Great fit, soft and stretchy and seem durable so far. I am 5’3, 160lbs and ordered a medium and I love the mid thigh length!
These leggings are fleece lined! I love how soft they are. I am 6'3 and they hit me right at the top of the ankle. I got a large, I would prefer them to be a little longer but still love them!

Im 6’2 185 lbs I bought a large so that the sleeves would be long enough based off reviews But now im thinking I should have gone medium like I normally do because it’s too baggy and hangs weird on my hips. I washed it and lightly dried well and it didn’t shrink. The neck hole is too big and hangs weird and the material is nice and heavy yet thin? Hard to explain. It’s super soft. I really like it but I might have to tuck it in or layer it with a vest to hide the weird bottom part.

Very soft. Not thick thick, but has a degree of thickness that keeps you warm. I wore a tank top underneath. I’m 5’0 & 135lbs. The length is perfect and so arm the sleeves even though I’m on the shorter side. You can dress this long sleeve up or wear casual. I haven’t washed it yet. I wore it today with black slacks pants to work. This color matches easily with different colors. I will buy in other colors.

Love this sweater. It’s the perfect weight. Not super heavy. It’s really soft. I’m 5’3, and normally tops are very long and the sleeves are super long. This is a good length and the sleeves are perfect. If you are on the tall side you may find them too short. I ordered a S and it fits perfect. Loved it so much I ordered a second one in a different color.

Nice lightweight sweater. I ordered the xl as that’s my usual size, and it fits perfectly 5’4”, 190 lbs. soft and comfortable. I got the navy with plaid details and also the green with light green collar and cuffs. Would definitely order again.

Im 5'5 and 112lbs for reference. These are very cozy, haven't wore them outside yet but they feel like they will be very warm, nice and thick with the fleece lining, thicker than other brands I bought. They could be a little longer but they fit good, I got the extra small. They have a silky outer material and soft fuzzy inside. They come to just below my belly button which i like because im not a fan of high waisted clothes to begin with

These were warm, but the fit was weird. I ordered a small, they were tight & showed every bump & flaw on my legs & butt. So I ordered a medium. They were not tight, but still showed every bump & flaw. They are unflattering in both sizes on me. They pic of the brown is to show that the green pants overshare your skin texture compared to other lined tights. I have a 27 in waist, 36 in hips & a 31 in inseam. I returned them.

These jeans have a flattering high waist and a true wide-leg cut that looks modern and stylish. The denim feels durable and the light blue wash matches the photos. They run a bit long (I’m 5’3”), so shorter people may need heels or hemming. No shrinkage after washing, but there’s no stretch, so choose your size carefully.

This review is for the YUCOLEN Women's Wide Leg Jeans Baggy High Waist Stretchy Jeans. At first I was a bit hesitant to order these jeans considering they had no reviews, they were from a brand I had never heard of and the images on the product detail page were not great. Let me ensure you these jeans exceeded expectations and are my new favorite pair of jeans. They look 10 x better in person than in the images. The images don’t justice to these jeans. Pros: -comfy -fit really great (122 lbs, 5’8”) -long enough to sit below my ankles while standing which is what I wanted for modesty reasons and because I personally don’t like jeans to sit above my ankles -mostly cotton making them breathable -I tried another pair of high waisted jeans from another brand and they made me really warm and sweatyyyy unfortunately I wanted to take them off the minute they went on. These are the opposite. They look and feel like jeans but their comfort and coolness is not like jeans which is amazing!! Cons: None. I am hopeful they will hold up in the wash. Let’s find out. If they end up not doing well over time I will come back and update my review. For now, I highly recommend these baggy high waisted women’s jeans. I received them so quickly and was pleased with the packaging, quality, use and affordability of the jeans.

I’m in love with these wide leg pants! They are long, and have plenty of stretch in the fabric. They fit nicely- do run a bit big as I am 185lbs and wear a 14/16- and these are a bit loose. But I think after washing and drying them and wearing a belt they will fit more snugly? The light blue wash/color looks fantastic! The leg cuffs are not hemmed. Very comfortable and stylish. Also they are long- I am “5’7” and I can wear platform sandals with them and they are still to my heel.

Wow, what a great belt! I wear a size 14, 44 hip, 36 waist, 44 bust, 38F, 5'6 and 205 lb. I got the XL and it fits great, I might have even been able to size down but I wasn't going to chance it. I love this belt because it's definitely got the cowboy western vibe but could easily dress up any outfit, including a little black dress as shown in the image.

I almost never write reviews, but I’m so pleased with these pants, I just had to. I ordered size 32, I’m 5’9” and 179 lbs. when I was younger, I was much slimmer, and pants like these fit great. I wasn’t sure how I’d look in these, but I actually think they are flattering. (We still wanna look great at 55, right?) They have a substantial weight and dressy feel, with kind of a sheen. Very high-waisted, and a tad stretchy. They stretch slightly after wear, so I probably could have gone with a 31. Anyway, they made me feel like a million bucks at the opera. I’m super pleased with my purchase, and will be getting more colors!
I really like the pants. They were comfy but really made for someone taller. I’m 5’2, 130lbs. The waist to beginning of the inseam was just too long.
My new favorite teacher pants!!! They fit me so well and they are even kinda stretchy. Absolutely love the material. I am 5’4” and they are the perfect length. Not cropped.

Overall really great quality! Perfect for maternity (the small fits me at 7 months pregnant, 120 lbs) and will be great postpartum. There's one small area that isn't blended as well and the jeans have a slight smell even after washing, but overall I highly recommend! I'm 5'1 and the length is perfect, so these are great if you're petite.

I have gotten so many compliments on these jeans! They are very comfortable. Good quality material. Taper fit, not tight. Belly friendly! Drawstring waist. I am “5’7” 183 lbs. I am thick in my belly area and backside. I got an XL. and like them a lot. Deep pockets!

I LOVE these jeans! I rarely am able to order jeans online and have them fit, but these were PERFECT right out of the bag. I'm 5'6" 135lbs and ordered the medium. I probably could've went with the small, but I hate skin tight jeans (even with the stretch) and I'm anticipating these might shrink a little after washing. The pocket size and placement is flattering, even with a pancake tush like mine. The denim is comfortable and soft and the embroidery stitching is the quality you see in much more expensive jeans. For $50, I thought these were a steal and have come back to order another pair. I do feel they are a little long; I definitely would not be able to wear them without a boot heel, unless I hemmed them.

I purchased the tan color in size small. The color and embroidery are very nice and the slacks look just like the pictures. The size fits right, as well. My main complaint is the length. I'm 5'4", that's average height, but the length is for someone 5'10". I'll now need to go and get them professionally hemmed, which will cost even more money, especially since these jeans are expensive to begin with.

Love these jeans, makes me feel nostalgic for my teen years, Wore them for the first time today got lots of compliments . would love to find them in capri length too. Size medium, I’m 5’3” and 152 lbs

I really like these jeans, but they are too big in the thighs. I am 5'2" and weigh about 105 lbs. My hips are 35" and my waist about 30". I am 66, so I have a thicker waist. I usually wear about a size 4 or 6. I ordered a small in these, which was the recommended size. The waist and hips fit nicely, but the baggy thighs don't look good. They are about 2" too long, but I am use to having to hem up pants. They are high waisted, which I also like. They came up to my bell button. I am sending these back and will try the xs, but they will probably be too tight in the waist. I hope this review helps. Also, the embroidery is only on one leg.

The is a cute sleevless top. The color is a nice khaki color and looks as like the picture. It's made well with no seams or threads sticking out anywhere. Fabric is soft and is stretchy which is very nice. It is a fitted slim tan top and feels nice against the skin. I bought the black one as well. I'm 5'2, 139 for reference. I normally wear a large or extra large for an oversized fit. I didn't want it to fit tight. It's a lose fit enough for me. The material is a heavier material, stretches enough to hug the body, and is soft on the skin. Pairs well with jeans or you can dress it up as well.

The quality of this shirt is very good quality for the price. The ribbed material is thick, stretchy and not see through at all. I got the XL because i wanted it to not be skin tight, well this shirt runs a bit small and is very form fitting. For reference I am 5'6", 205 lbs, Size 12/14. I prefer just a slightly looser fit then this but the color is great and the style is nice, just wish it was a tad looser worried it will shrink after washing and then it will be to tight.

I love this jumper so much!!! I almost didn’t buy it because there were very few girls my size modeling it. So I wanna leave this review so people can see what a person in size 6 looks like in a small. About 128 lbs. 5’6”. One of my favorite Amazon purchases ever. And I’ve purchased a lot! Haha! 🤣

I love this dress. I got a size L and I think that was the right choice. I think it will still look cute even if I lose weight. For reference I'm 5'2 and 175 lbs. The length on me goes to my ankles, not the floor which I'm pretty happy about. It has usable pockets that are deep enough so if I put my phone or debit card in they won't fall out if I lean over. I do have to unbutton the sides when I put it on and then button them again. It isn't hard but this is real denim and doesn't have stretch to it. The nice thing about those is that the dress will last a long time. The top front pocket world good stuff as well but I didn't put anything in it. I wore me sweater under the straps but you could wear a cardigan or sweater over just as easily. The overall dress can be layered in winter or worn with a light tee in summer. Very cute and durable item, it could be a staple piece.

Delivery was on time. It’s a soft feeling fabric. Color is what I expected. I’m 5’8” and 180, I have a tummy and this fits nicely, XL. I could possibly get by with a Lrg. But think the tummy and arms would be tight.

The shirt arrived vacuum sealed in a bag. The fabric is soft and a nice weight for summer. I have not washed the shirt yet, so I cannot say how well it washes or holds up, but the label says 95% polyester/ 5% spandex, so I am guessing it will wash well. The pattern was actually prettier in person, and was not quite as green as it looked in the seller's pictures. I liked that the shirt is 3/4 sleeve, as I do not like my upper arms exposed, but I did think the sleeves were a couple inches too long on me. To be fair though, I am only 5'2". I would have liked the sleeve opening to be a little smaller. I think it would have given the shirt a bit more shape in the arms, and it would have allowed me to push the sleeves up to my elbows. For reference, my bust measurement is 47.5" and waist is 44", so I would say the 3x approximately equivalent to a traditionally sized women's 22/24. For reference, my bust measurement is 47.5" and waist is 44". Pricewise, I do think the full price of 24.99 is a touch high, so maybe wait and catch it on sale. Overall it is a cute shirt, and it is comfortable. If the sleeve cuffs were a little tighter, I would have given it 5 stars.

These fleece-lined pants are super comfortable and stretchy -- they're 25% spandex! They look form-fitting on the product page so I ordered a couple of sizes up. Other than being a bit too long, they're perfect for how I like my pants to fit. They're nicely cut with a front yoke and 5 pockets: 2 in front, 2 in back, and a perfectly sized phone pocket on the side of the leg. They're a nice shiny deep black with a soft fleece lining (even though they appear grey in one of my photos, I lightened it to make the pockets show up more clearly). The elastic waist has belt loops so I can wear them as slip-ons or use the zippered fly. They're well made and the fabric is high quality, so they're worth the slightly high price. My only reservation is that polyester tends to pill so I don't know how well they'll hold up over time. The tag says to machine wash them at 30C or less on delicate, then tumble dry on low or hang them to dry. I hang-dry most of my polyester clothes to avoid pilling.

I got these fleece lined pants for my sister (5'9", 130 lbs, size Medium in Navy Blue) and they fit her really well. The stretchiness is one of the best features — they have a lot of give without feeling too loose or sloppy, so they’re comfortable for everyday wear. The five pockets are surprisingly practical: two in the front, two in the back, and an extra cellphone pocket on the left hip, which is really handy. The elastic band in the back does give them a bit of an "old lady pants" feel at first glance, but honestly, once they’re on, they look fine and the fit is really flattering. She was even surprised that the medium fit her comfortably since pants like this are usually too snug & short — but these are VERY stretchy, so they fit perfectly. The fleece lining is warm without being bulky, which makes them great for cooler weather. Overall, these pants are stylish, functional, and comfortable. Definitely a solid choice if you want something cozy with good stretch and real pockets!!!

I Love these shorts! I like the length, the style and the quality! For reference, I am 5’4”, 135 lbs, waist is 34” and hips are 38, ordered a size Medium. The rolled up, frayed, hem is actually STITCHED up, so the won’t ever roll down!♥️ They have a lot of stretch in them, which I don’t need the benefit of, and wide leg openings. I probably could have gotten a size small, the stretch in the denim might then have gotten some use and they would have been snug in the waist. Overall, they are soooo comfortable!!

Based off other reviews, I ordered an XL and they're a bit big. I'm 5'3" and weigh174lbs. They are comfortable and the material quality seems good. The reason I'm rating 4 star is because of the awful smell when I opened the package.
Love these shorts so much. They are super comfortable and have just the right amount of give to them. Highly recommend!I’m 5’4”, 117 lbs, ordered the small. Perfect fit!

This is a beautiful sweater. I love the way the sleeves fit at the shoulders and at the wrist. It is very comfortable and soft, and the button details paired with the color block makes it look very unique. This sweater can be dressed up with a pair of slacks and boots, or dressed down with a pair of jeans. It is not too thick, and can be worn tucked in or just worn out as it hangs very elegantly around the hips. I got an XXL for reference with the pictures. I'm 5'3, 170 lbs. Very nice top!

I picked up this lounge set in XL (I’m a solid size 16) and had high hopes - and for the most part, it delivered! The pants are fabulous: stretchy in all the right places, drawstring waist, and just the right length for my 5'6" frame. It has that relaxed-but-put-together look I love for fall. Now, the top is where things get a little confusing. The material is thicker than expected (yay for chilly mornings!), but it’s much more fitted than your typical "lounging-around" top. I’m a C-cup and it’s definitely snug in the chest. It’s not uncomfortable or unwearable - it actually looks pretty chic tucked in - but if you’re expecting that oversized Sunday-morning vibe, this isn’t it. Overall: great set for looking pulled together at home, or for running errands in comfort and style. Just be ready for a top that’s more cute brunch than Netflix and flop.

When I first took this out of the package I was excited to try it on, because I think it looked cute. After getting it on however, I changed my mind about liking it. The waist is too big so to make it fit, I had to pull it down further on my hips. Normally I am o.k. with doing this to get a skirt a better fit, but because of the ruffle design, it makes my hips look bigger than they are. I recommend sizing down on this skirt if you want to buy it. For reference, I am 5'2" and 115 pounds and I ordered this in a small. As far as the construction on this, it's not bad. There were a few loose threads, which I trimmed off. The stitching feels like it's tight, so I don't expect the seams to split. I washed it in hot water and put it in the dryer on high heat in hopes of shrinking it a bit, which it did. There was about 1.5" shrinkage in the waist, but within an hour it had stretched out to the original size plus a bit more. It also had a few wrinkles after coming out of the dryer, so it needed to be ironed before wearing (I hate wearing wrinkled clothing, it's one of my idiocies). If there wasn't an issue with the sizing, this skirt would be a 5-star skirt. I think it would look really cute with a concho belt and some cowgirl boots, but because of the sizing issue I am knocking 1 star off.

For reference, I am 5’8”160 pounds and wearing a medium. There is no stretch to the material so it is regular denim. I usually wear like a size 10 sometimes a 12 in clothing and the medium fits me fine. Material is good and thick and zipper seems good. Definitely cute to dress it up with some boots and jacket 😊

I’m 5’2 and 120lbs. I ordered this in size small and it’s perfect. It comes vacuum packed so expect wrinkles but there are instructions on getting it smoothed out - put on a hanger and let sit in the sun. I actually just put it in the dryer for 3 minutes and it came out fine. The fabric is light enough to wear on a warm day.
I bought the XS for my lanky 11 year old daughter for a Rosie the Riveter costume . She is around 4’10 and 75 pounds. Fit excellent with the sleeves cuffed up

Star lite sparkles in the top, Fit me perfectly, See through Only where it's supposed to be, Comfortable, Functional, & 💯% Stylish❕ Not too Tight, Not too Loose, Fits Just Right ova' these 36G/38D bra'd 🍈🍈's 🤭 😉❕ Avidlove Mesh Long Sleeve Sparkle Crop Top Square Neck Y2K Date Nights sexy and I wish would have ordered the black, p!nk, & wine red tops: [purchased Aug 28, 2025 |

This mesh long sleeve top is very beautiful. I am 5’6” 160lbs 36D wearing a Medium. I wore this for all night dancing, and it was very comfortable and I got so many compliments. The material is thin and stretchy but very good quality. It fit me tight, sexy and flattering. The top is very pretty with colorful bling on it. I honestly didn’t notice if any of them fell off or not. But I absolutely love it and highly recommend this trendy and stylish long sleeve!

I really like the fit of this jacket. I'm taller (5'11") and it's hard to find sleeves that are long enough. These are just right, maybe slightly short when my arms aren't at my sides, but it's acceptable, especially since I tend to roll the sleeves on my jean jackets. It has a nice fitted waist area, though because I'm tall the slight flair at the bottom does hit my slightly above my hips. I don't anticipate buttoning the jacket often though so again, it's acceptable. Now, the color. I had read reviews so I knew what to expect but this is definitely a tan, bordering on khaki color. When I read silver, I think grey. Nope. Knowing it would be more beige than grey I still ordered it because I wanted to be able to wear it with all of my jeans (white jeans too). If you're hoping for grey, don't bother. I took a pic with two sweaters I have in my closet to show the grey vs beige, I also took a pic compared to some white jeans to show the difference there. I already have a dark blue jean jacket but it's pretty old with more of a cropped style...I might end up replacing it with a dark blue one of this style since I do like it so much.

Even better irl. Quality denim fabric, perfect fit / true to size and incredibly comfortable! The false waist and side buttons make them far more flattering to the figure than traditional overalls. I am long in the torso so I adjusted the straps and they look terrific! Length is right where I wanted it (just grazing my instep, I’m 5’8” with a 29” inseam). Cute with sneakers, sandals or boots. Highly recommend, they’re adorable!

I love these! Currently 31 weeks pregnant, (5’6 &180lbs-ordered an xl) and was struggling to find cute clothes that fit and was comfortable. And this pair of overalls did it! The material is perfect, stretchy, but not like spandex, and just hold in the right places. The army green washed color is very stylish and the pockets are a plus!

I am 4’11” 125lbs I ordered an XS and these are by far my favorite thing to wear at the moment. Since I am so short the length is not an issue for me. I did have have to adjust the clips all the way to the back. I love the wide legs and how the buttons cinches at the waist. I also ordered the light blue in xs but they ran bigger… In other reviews I saw there was a smell complaint. They did smell like moth balls but I made sure to wash them before I wore them and it wasn’t an issue either for myself.

Made of a good quality denim - nice heft, soft. I am 5'8"/140/Size 6 and purchased a medium for a more roomy look. I would not say these are oversized, but if you want a more fitted look, go with your true size. Hit just below the ankle but not quite at the top of my shoes. Wore them all day today to run errands and they are super comfy. Will be a goto for me.
Love them!! I am 5ft 4 130lbs ordered a small they are perfect I actually like them cuffed too!! Fit is perfect I ordered the green. Super cute
I am 5’2 and usually am a medium in tops and a 6/8 in pants and I got a size small! They fit awesome and are super comfy

I am 5'8" and 165lbs with a 31" waist. Based on the size chart I ordered a size L and it is just a tad snugger than I would like. I should have sized up to an XL for a more drop waist type of look. I know these are supposed to be kind of a shorter length but they are almost ridiculously short on me for the style.This is a thin to midweight demin. It washes up nicely without any wrinkling or shrinkage. I love the big hand pockets. The back pockets are almost excessively big, they go all the way down to the seam below your butt, which could make it a bit tough to get things out of them. The quality is decent.The waistband comes with a rope in it, I don't really need that to tighten the waistband and don't love the look of it. So I will probably remove it.Right now I am trying to decide if I will keep these. I don't think they are very flattering, especially with sneakers. I might try wearing them with some boots to see if I like that look. The waistband is a bit scratchy as well. The denim weight is fine and I like the pockets.I would recommend if you are on the shorter side and like this type of look. If you are on the taller side know that these will be really short. I would also recommend sizing at least one size up if you want to wear these as a drop-waist pant and get the loose look the model has. They are a decent jean for the price.

These fall to my exact ankle and I am only 5 feet, 3 inches tall. The pants have a very wide leg like a sailor pant. They are 35 and a half inches long including the waist but note that the waist band is 2 and a half inches wide. The hips are 41 inches.I think that they are very cute and a nice weight on the denim. They feel comfortable to wear. I am not sure how the string belt will stay tied.

Comfy and flexible denim! I am 5’2”, and 175lbs at 25 weeks pregnant. I got a medium and I love that the stretch waistband can sit low on my belly. The wide leg is cute and just big enough to be trendy. All the pockets run really deep too. Really happy they’ll fit post pregnancy too.

I am 5’ so these fit me like regular length jeans and I love that. The material is super soft and lightweight. I ordered a size small and they fit perfectly. Well designed with nice details. Love the back pockets, they are a little bit longer than regular pockets and add a nice silhouette. I’m super happy with these baggy jeans. Great for running around and casual get togethers.
Received so many compliments on this top! Soft material, lightweight. The color seems to match the picture. I am 5’4”, 135lbs and got a medium. I have a long torso but still sits nicely on the crop
These fit well, length is right to the floor (I am 5’5, 133lbs, got a size Medium) Very comfortable and not see thru. Material is like a jersey knit/tee shirt

I LOVE these pants! I was skeptical when I ordered them, not sure if I’d like the style. But I am so happy with them. I’m 5’5,” 123 lbs., and short-waisted with long legs. I ordered a Small, which fits perfectly. The wide waistband sits perfectly at my navel, the hips are snug but not tight, and the legs hit just right over my foot…but not too long that they drag on the floor. The color is more vibrant yet more muted than in the product image on the listing. I love these!

Nice fit - they’re high waisted, with really low pockets so they don’t accentuate your hips which is nice. No pleats, also nice. Material is like lounge PJ pants, but don’t cling. Too long for me (5’3”) but that’s why I know a seamstress ;)Problem is the color. Image from the posting shows a mustard yellow and navy blue print… but instead of yellow it’s peach pink. Just not what I wanted….My measurements: 42 32 42 (bust/waist/hip)

Beautiful and very colorful. Soft and comfortable. Nice pockets. Long enough, fits good even though I'm tall. The fabric is a little bit thin. I will be wearing shorts underneath. For reference, I'm 5'10", 155#, and wearing a size XL. I usually wear a US large, but wanted extra room because I like my palazzo pants to be big.

I’m 5’1 and 170lbs and bought a size medium. Love the fit! Super cute! Using it for family photos. Shirt is thin and see through so you will need a tank top under! I typically wear size large in shirts but I knew this was meant to be “over sized” and didn’t want it to be huge on me. I would size down if you want a more fitting look (but not tight).
I loved the fit of this but unfortunately it was too thin and see through in the white color. Soft material just not thick. For size reference, I got the small and I'm 5'0, 110, 32C

I debated ordering these for WEEKS because of the reviews because I’m a tall girly. I’m SO glad I ordered them!! I’m 5’9 and 170lbs and they fit perfect!! I ordered an XL to get a more baggy feel and I’m obsessed.
Really cute overalls! They fit well and I love the cargo style pants. Only thing that didn’t work for me was the length because they drag a bit but I am 5’3 so that’s not uncommon.

These are fantastic. Quality material. Comfortable. True to size and well proportioned. I’m 5 feet so I cut a bit off the leg and will probably not even bother to hem for a raw look. I added those pin in buttons to nip the waist since I like a curvy fit. But they’d work fine either way. Or cuffed or rolled up. The side pockets add a charming rugged detail but sit flat and don’t add bulk like some do.

The XS is perfect! I’m 5ft about 110lbs and there’s still enough room to put a hoodie on underneath comfortably. If I wanted to I could even put leggings under as well. I am pretty short so I did have to fold them so I wouldn’t drag them and I did wear my platform Nikes. They are great quality and thick material. Highly recommend! They still had that cute loose fit on and they were super comfy.

I’m obsessed with these overalls! The construction is great, materials are great. Not too thin not too thick, not very stretchy. They don’t feel cheap at all. I am typically a size small (130lbs and 5’7”) and originally ordered a medium because that’s what Amazon recommended and I thought these must run small because it’s a Chinese brand. The medium was HUGE, like a standard American large (but to be fair these are meant to be a baggier fit) so I exchanged for a small which is perfect. Order your regular size OR size down if you don’t want a baggy fit. These are SO cute and I love the way they fit. They seem really comfortable too. Can’t wait to wear them out this weekend!

These were much better than expected. Thick, durable fabric, cute design. Despite other comments, my buckles were all attached. The buckles are a thin metal, but not awful. I am 5'2", 120lbs and the small was very roomy. The tag says size 30, small, so there is a sizing difference.

I probably would have sized up one, but they do fit. I’m 5’9” and 135 lbs, wearing a size 4. They’re a bit tight on the legs—I’d like them a little looser—but the high waist and stretchy material are comfortable. Cute for summer.

I'm 5'5" between 150 to 160lbs. What caught my attention was the color..Moonlight Jade. It's a very soft color and very close tothe picture. Amazon kept telling me to order up to Large. After reading the comments I decided to stay with my Medium and I'm glad I did! I don't like overly large tops and sweatshirts. This fits perfect in body length, arm length and where it hits at the hips. It is a little lighter weight fabric and the inside is a soft brushed short fleece. I have enough room in this shirt to layer over a tee shirt. I haven't found any itchy seams and it seems to be well made. I have not washed it yet but I do wash on cold and hang EVERYTHING to dry. I don't suspect it to do anything strange in the wash. I WILL be ordering another color!!
This crew sweat shirt fits nice. I layer a tee underneath it. Material is soft, light to medium weight. Im thinking about ordering it in another color. 5’5” 126 lbs

I purchased the Blue & Sail Blue in an XL. I'm 5'8", 195 lbs. I love this sweatshirt! It's more of a French terry, which I like because it's not so heavy. It's soft & has a nice stretch. The bottom is nice & loose and the fit is just slightly boxy. It fits my 40D chest nicely. The side slits are a nice touch. I liked them so much I ordered the Spinach Green. The reason for the title, Not the Same, is because this color is a different fabric. While the 2 blue ones were 95% poly, 5% Spandex, the Spinach Green one is 50% cotton & 50% poly. Totally different fabric. It is heavier & obviously has no stretch. So the fit feels more "snug". Also the color is darker than what shows on Amazon. I'm keeping it because it's an ok sweatshirt, I just don't love it like the other 2.

Vest are suppose to be a bit loose since they go over clothes. this one runs at least 2 full sizes too small. Maybe good for a kid. My wife is 5'8" and can't wear it. The big difference takes away from the nice build and material. It is a shame.
Super cute! I really like the material. It super comfortable The only reason I gave it 4 stars is because it is not long like pictured. I am 5'2" and it hits right at my waist.
Super cute and comfy! Great color! It is a little more cropped but still long enough to tuck in front. 5’3 130 pounds - ordered a small and fit great!
Love!!! Great quality, the sizing was perfect. Can be dressed up or more casual.I’m 5’8 125 lbs. True size small
It’s hard to find clothing that is flattering on a 4’8 women buts this isn’t! It is lightweight and feel warm and it look good even in a short curvy lady . I’m a size 10 ordered my size and it fit!

I have a cropped jean jacket I love for spring weather but I wanted a larger more oversized one that provides more coverage and this fit the bill. I'm 5'11 and the large fit me great. In the picture I have a t shirt and long sleeve flannel and there's still a little room left. The sleeves were nice and long too which is super appreciated #tallpeoplestruggles I also love the black color. I was worried it was going to have some sort of acid wash effect since the black color on the model looks a little off but I'm relieved to say that is not the case. Attaching a photo in daylight so you can see the black color.

I feel jacket runs pretty true to size- but if you are between sizes- go up. I wish the sleeves were a little longer- but I AM 6’0 so I have that problem a lot. Medium weight jacket - so perfect 3 season. The buttons are quite noisy when you move around- that’s really my only complaint. Nice tailored look. I feel like I’m channeling my inner Freddie Mercury.

A couple of threads that are out but other than that this jacket is just very stylish and cute looking. The jeans material is nice and thick and good quality. It washes very well and doesn’t need any ironing after washing. It comes out like new condition. It fit my daughter perfectly and this is her normal size and she weights around 135 and height of 5 feet 10 inches. They look very sleek she loves the buttons design on the front area, looks very nice.

Needed a good pair of “mom shorts”, and as I have a few pairs of the fringe shorter shorts that fit well from the same seller (m), thought these would work well. Definitely have some stretch, are comfortable, and overall look/quality is good. They are a tad big on me. I’m hoping they shrink in the wash. Fit well at first, but by the end of the day they had stretched out and were a little saggy. I’m 5’2’’ and 145lbs. I think I could have gone with the small, and will probably order the small instead so they fit more “mom” than “grandma”.

Let me start by saying I am 5'0, 150 lbs, and very curvy. Finding shorts that fit well without riding up or producing a "waist gap" is a challenge. I absolutely love these shorts. They have a great stretch that hugs my curves and gives my bum a little boost, and they don't cut into my thighs. I can honestly say I feel sexy wearing these. I purchased a large, which fits perfectly with lots of room to spare. Buy them, you will love them!

Absolutely LOVE them. Exactly what I was hoping for. They fit perfectly. I ordered Large, even though Amazon said I should order XL. I'm 5'5" and 170 (unfortunately, but it's all menopause belly). As I lose belly fat, these will continue to fit nicely. I ordered the black ones too, but they sent me some weird polyester ones that weren't even the same item. So, I just tried ordering them again and will see if they get it right. UPDATE - I sent back the erroneous ones and by the next day, the correct ones were sent to me! The black pair is awesome. Wish I had bought these sooner! I have them in four colors now.

I ordered a medium and they fit perfect. I am 5'6" and 125 lbs. I ordered the beige. I am returning them because the left leg seam is cut wrong. It is going to the inside of my leg whereas the right leg seam is straight down the front. It feels weird too because it is cut wrong. I will order another pair and hopefully it will be cut correctly. I took a star off for the bad cut and how wrinkled they are. I hope the wrinkles will come out after I wash and tumble damp dry the next pair. UPDATE: I ordered another pair and they are cut the same way. Returning and looking for something else. If you look at the photo of the model in the white pants the seam is supposed to go straight down the center of your leg. Unfortunately the 2 I got doesn't look like that.

I was looking for fleece-lined leggings for when I move to the mountains this winter, and I’ll be spending a ton of time outdoors through my work, but also working in a very casual-dress office environment as well. I’ve lived in the area before, and I needed to stock up on pieces I can layer. I seriously just ordered three more pairs of these leggings, because they’re on sale, and the cabin I’ll be living in has access to a washer/dryer, but our buildings operate on solar power, and to conserve our energy I’ll likely drive to the laundromat every few weeks, and these are the most comfortable, attractive, versatile leggings I own. I can layer them with my other thermal tights/leggings for extra warmth if needed in the office, or layer them under ski-pants or thicker hiking pants outside. Also, I just wore them to lunch with a friend today, they look fantastic, so I just wore them with a long-sleeved more dressy top and they were great on their own. I am 5’4” and 128-130 lbs, and curvy hourglass shape, more curvy on the top though. My regular bottom half measurements are included in the photos I’ve attached. The mediums fit very well, even though most of my leggings are smalls, I wanted something looser and able to layer over another pair of fleece leggings for cold days - and these leggings are soft and so stretchy that I can comfortably wear them alone or layer below with another thin thermal layer. I love that they’re lined leggings, but especially since I sized up a little, they aren’t inappropriately clingy. The waistband is soft, stretchy, and not constricting at all. The waistband on the medium is a little loose on me, but not in a way that they’re baggy or would fall down, or that anyone would notice. Im curled up on the couch writing this right now, and regardless of how I sit or lay down, they’re comfortable and flexible. The leggings are opaque and not sheer at all. They’ll provide a great “blue jean” looking cover that I can wear my super stretchy fleece lined leggings under if needed. I just bought another pair of the blue, and two pairs of the black. Thank you to the poster that mentioned piling. Because of it, I washed these the same way I wash my more traditional looking fleece lined leggings - in mesh laundry bags on a cold delicate cycle and then hang to dry. I’ll update my review if there’s any issue with piling with this laundry routine, but I haven’t had any yet.

I'm 5'6, weigh 150lbs and I ordered this black jeans in a size medium and they fit me well. I was worried a size medium might have been too tight but these jeans are so super stretchy that they went on easily. They hug my curves but don't feel overly tight or constricting. They are thin, comfy and easily move with you. The only thing I don't like is that because they are so stretchy, they tend to bunch or roll up a bit in random places on my hips, butt and thighs. It's not a huge deal but it can make them look a tad too big at times. I sometimes wonder if I should have sized down to a small but I am mostly happy with the medium although I started wearing them with a belt to help keep them more tight and taut. I really do love how comfortable they are though. They aren't thick or stiff and I love the flared bottom. One thing to be aware of is that these have some distressed tears in them by design and they look great but they have one of those tear patterns on the back right pocket and so if you put a credit card or any other slim item in that pocket, it will fall right out by sliding right through the distressed tear marks so be careful with that. I almost lost my credit card when I shoved it into that back pocket but luckily I heard it hit the floor a few seconds afterwards. The flaws on these jeans are minor because overall they look great, feel good and have become my go-to jeans on days when I want to look cute but still feel comfy. Some of my pants are a size large but the medium in these fit me thanks to their extreme stretchability so you may want to take that into consideration when ordering and go with the smaller size if you are someone in between sizes.

Overall these jeans were pretty impressive. I'm really happy with the way they fit around my hips, butt and waist. Unfortunately, they were just too long. I'm 5'3, 145 lb and generally wear a medium/8-10. Looking at the size chart the 8 to10 on these jeans was a large so that's what I went with. They have incredible stretch and the high waisted cut fit really well without digging in or any causing any discomfort. They also hug the hips, thighs and back side well without feeling too tight. Overall I felt that the fit was not just comfortable but very flattering. The denim has a nice light/medium weight and even though it has a lot of stretch it still has a good denim feel. My only real complaint truly is in the length. Even with heeled boots on they bunched around my ankles which I didn't like with the flared cut of the leg. They feel and look well made and I think the price point is very fair. If you're a couple inches taller than I am I wouldn't hesitate to grab these. My 🌟 scale, from ⭐ to ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐: ⭐ Regret in a Box...Disappointing and not worth the money. I wouldn’t recommend this to anyone. ⭐⭐ Needs Work...Has some potential but unfortunately falls short in too many ways. ⭐⭐⭐ It’s Fine...Decent, but nothing to get excited about and not something you'll reach for very often. ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Really Good...Just shy of perfection and definitely still worth grabbing. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Exceeded my expectations!...A new wardrobe favorite. I’d absolutely buy again and highly recommend.

I was worried these would be too small, but they fit perfectly. I have muscular thighs, and the fabric stretched enough to accommodate comfortably. The flared legs after the knee are a nice touch, and the waist fit just right without needing a belt. The waistband is stretchy with belt loops for added flexibility. At 5'6", the waist sits a bit lower than it appears on the model. Both front and back pockets are real and functional, though not super deep. The ripped look with the heart details is stylish and well‑executed. My one major criticism is odor retention. Most clothing with that classic chemical preservation smell clears up after one wash, but these still have a strong odor after two washes and 48 hours of air drying with a large fan. I usually only see this level of persistence with black polyester, so it's surprising given these are 70% cotton. I plan to try a long soak followed by a wash with vinegar as fabric softener and a line dry on a sunny day, which typically works for stubborn smells. Overall, great fit and style, but the lingering odor is a notable drawback that keeps this from being a five‑star product.

I ordered these jeans without any real expectations. I'm not one who usually wears flare leg jeans. With that being said, these jeans are decent. I was surprised that they fit in the length because the picture is deceiving. I am 5'8 and they were plenty long enough for me. With the flare leg you could wear boots with these. They have some minor distressing on them but nothing over the top. When I first took them out of the package I was concerned they wouldn't fit. I ordered a medium (8-10), and they were true to size. They are stretchy in the legs and waist. The material is a little thinner than your typical blue jean, but they are not see through. My one complaint is that they misspelled the word beauty on the tag. It says "Dedicated to Your Beauy". So, that's disappointing. Overall, they are a decent pair of jeans for the price.

So I have one of those bodies that pants just don’t fit...24 inch waist, 36 inch hips. Either my butt is about to tear a seam the size of the Grand Canyon or I have bagging and buckling at the waist...more than a belt can contend with. A couple of years ago I bought an inexpensive pair of jeggings and they have become my favorite “go to” pants. A couple of months ago I decided to buy more, but discovered they were discontinued.So began the process of purchasing the highest rated “jeggings” on amazon, only to find they were actually denim, stiff, and didn’t fit well. Many disappointments.Until I found these!!!! Exactly what I wanted...super soft, thick enough to provide warmth, body hugging so no baggy britches. So comfortable! They do look small out of the bag, but they stretch. I am small (5’1’), so they do “collect” at the bottom, but compared to my usual woes, this is not complaint-worthy.These are not denim...they are leggings with a denim print. If that’s what you are looking for, I think you’ll be pleased.

Came with stains. And the legs are too wide to roll like the gal in the picture. I ordered 2 of the same thing, different colors. This color had stains and was stretched out compared to the other color i ordered. The other color i ordered also came in different packaging and had the actual name and size of the product, which leads me to believe this grey one is one someone has worn and returned. Not too happy with the stains and how baggy this one fits. Definitely returning. Very unflattering. My son also pointed out the gal in the pictures is holding the fabric with her thumb and each picture has a fold to it, showing a different way it fits/looks on her compared to it looks in person. To us anyway. May keep the other color. Also not sold on how short it is, and with the legs/ankles being so wide...they dont stay rolled and keep falling when walking. Im 5'8/9" and have long legs. Its just all around not the cutest for my body. Its really thin and can see the tanktop lines underneath. My son said it makes my rear look like a grama!! I thought about shapewear underneath, but youd probably see the lines as well through the material....would around the house....but I wont be keeping them. I have enough lounge clothes. Wanted a nice fall outfit, and these just arent it unfortunately.
Super soft and thin. Perfect for cooler summer days or fall. With a sweater nice for winter. Fits just right I’m 5ft wore it end of pregnancy love how it stretched.
This was perfect for orange day. I am 5’7 135lbs and size medium most of the time.
I like this. It's comfy. I'm 127ish and 5'5". It's my lounge wear for now. I might start going out in it. I might start doing everything in it. I don't like that the crotch brushes my kankles.
Great product! Comfortable and soft. I’m 5.8, 160lb and bought size 8.

I didn't think I'd love these, but I do! I haven't really worn jeans in 7 years since I had my first kid. I'm a leggings only kinda girl and was previously only skinny jeans. Even more so I haaaate trying on pants or even ordering them online because sizing is all over the place and I've *never* found something that fits perfectly on the first try. They fit true to size. I went off the size of the last pair of pants I bought last year vs the sizing chart and they PERFECT. These are wildly comfortable and I don't feel squished or constantly annoyed wearing them. They are perfectly stretchy and perfectly high waisted. Personally I don't love the look of the style and feel like it's an unflattering look all around, but I've never been one to join in on fashion trends, so I'm putting my own self consciousness aside and enjoying these because of how comfortable they are. Pricewise is more expensive than I personally would routinely spend on jeans, but I know I'm cheap and $40 is pretty reasonable with what other brands are. (I'm a terrible model and tennis shoes look dumb with it, but I switched out of scrubs to go to a birthday dinner and didn't bring different shoes). I'm 5'4", about 175lbs and a size 12 was perfect.

These jeans are super cute. True to size. I love the fit. I have a proportionately small waist to hip ratio and often have trouble finding pants that fit my smaller waist and my larger thighs and hips. These pants fit perfectly. Very comfortable. The material is not a thick jeans material and has a slight stretch to it which makes them very soft. I'm 5'2" and wearing 2" heels and the length is great. Often bell bottoms are too big on the bottom, look kind of goofy and I end up not liking them. The flare on these is just right. Enough to be noticeable but not too much. The color is depicted accurately in the sellers photo. A nice soft gray/black. The washed out portion of color on the front of the legs is perfect. Very flattering to my bigger legs. I have nothing bad to say about these jeans! I'm loving them!!

These are fantastic jeans. They fit great. The fabric has nice stretch, so each size can fit a range of bodies. I am currently 168 lbs, 5ft 2", and wear size 12 bottoms. The size 12 jeans fit great. Because of my petite height, they are quite long on me, but that is expected. I also love the color of these jeans. They are a deep blue with nice fading. The fit and flair styling is flattering. They come up to my waist. The quality is great. The fabric and fit are so comfortable. There is no scent upon opening the package, and they wash and dry well with no shrinking. I can already tell that these are going to be a favorite pair of jeans, and I have a lot of jeans. At the time of this review, the price is $45.99, and these are worth the price.

These bell bottom jeans really surprised me! I tend to wear jeans with a mild flare but took a chance on these bells and I actually really like the look of them. I'm 5'4" about 130lbs, curvy figure and they fit more like wide leg jeans on me with a slightly wider flare at the bottom. The comfort level is awesome, my usual size is between 6-7, and I've gained some holiday weight but there was still plenty of forgiving stretch in the size 6. I also like how thick these jeans are, and they look great with heels. They went well with a wide variety of tops, doubtful you could go wrong. Fun to style! Good choice and value.

The blouse is exceptionally cute. I love the sleeves, the fabric has a soft gauzy feel, great for summer, and the fit is really cute. I do find that it’s a pretty wide neck line, which I like, but it is not on me as pictured in the model. I wanted pink, I went with the white with pink flowers and it’s really pretty, just the look I wanted. I would say it’s very flattering and true to the picture other than the wider neck. The fit is a little large. I’m 5 feet tall 125 pounds, 34D and the small fits fine but it is a little loose. I will update if there are any issues but so far I’m super happy.

Super cute and comfy. Wish I would have sized down. For reference I'm 5'4" 155 lbs. And in between a medium and large in tops. I bought a large but the medium would have been the better fit with this one. Washed and dried with zero shrinking. The lavender flowers are a beautiful vibrant color. My photos don't quite reflect how pretty this blouse is.

I bought these in both white and in the darker blue. I bought two different sizes because I wasn't sure how they were going to fit. I'm 5 ft 6 and 150 lb on a good day, and the mediums were actually the better fit. They've got a lot of stretch to them too so that makes them even more comfortable. The large also fit but definitely not as form-fitting but I decided to keep the medium and the large depending on whether I'm feeling skinny or bloated

Pretty good! I bought the black in a size 18, and I’m 5’4” with a 39” waist and 50” hips. It was pretty loose around the waist, but it fit amazing around the hips. I was hiking them up all during my work event, but at least they were very comfy and forgiving. I wish the waist line was as high as on the model in the picture. It was high waisted for jeans, but not as high as I wanted. The legs are suuuuuuper long—they pool on the floor around my feet. Even wearing my 5” heels, the hems were just barely above the floor. You could hem them, but then you’d reduce the awesome bell bottoms. I’d recommend these pants for any soul curvier and taller than me. d:

These were right on point for me. I'm 5'2, 130 lbs and they stop right at my feet. Definitely made for short people. If you are taller than 5'2 I wouldn't purchase. Material is stretchy, fits great around my thighs and butt, the waist band is snug for anyone with a little curves. Would 100% buy these in a white or they have them.
Comfortable and stretchy. Only issue is it is a short inseam. I have a 33in inseam, and fits like floods. If you have a shorter inseam the pants are nice.

Color and boot cut as as advertised. These are so high waisted though that they’re to my rib cage. I have a longer torso and these are extreme. I love some tummy coverage/control, but these don’t have that at all. They feel very thin and not shaping or anything. I’m sure they’re great for some, but not for my 5’4” smaller-midsize frame. I’ll be returning them.

ok so these are pretty comfortable, other than low rise. I’m 5’4” and the length of the leg is good & it probably could fit a much taller person. I’m 190lb & the photo suggests a rise at the natural waist. These didn’t even come to my belly button :/ Squeezes my love junk and is super unflattering True to size with a decent stretch so if low-to-mid is what you’re going for, these are for you.

I love these shorts so much, I want them in every color. I am 120-125# 5'1.5" and I originally ordered a size 4 and they were too loose on me for my preference. Definitely size down if you like them fitted bc they're stretchy and comfy. I like my shorts fitted, so I returned and ordered a size 2 and they fit perfectly. Amazon returns are so easy! No love handles are hanging over my shorts or anything.
Great shorts… 5 inch inseam. Very comfortable with some stretch. I am 5‘7“ and 152 pounds and I have a large

These are super cute and flattering. They are a nice length for a short person like me at 5’2”. They’ve got a lot of stretch to them but they don’t look like old lady shorts like some of the more stretchy denim shorts do. I bought a second pair in black I liked them so much. I’m normally a size 10 at about 150 lbs at 5”2” and the size 8’s fit perfectly. So the recommendations to size down were correct for me.
So comfy!! I am 157lbs & got these in a size 8. Fits perfectly. Very stretchy & soft. Will purchase more in other colors.

Belts are back in and these are super cute & affordable. 2/3 belts have been great for everyday use. The “suede” belt couldn’t withstand one use though. Would I buy again, yes but not the 3-pack. For reference, I am 5’4 and in between 16-18 Jean size. If you’re 16 and under, I’d recommend a size smaller as I’m currently using the last hole (it does come with a hole puncher).
Cute, but fit my body funny. I’m 5’2, 130 pounds and I bought a Medium. They were cute from the front, but they bunched funny in the back. If you don’t have hips or a butt, they are cute.
I love these shorts. I’m 5’4” 135, bought a size medium. So comfy. I don’t like hard pants. They aren’t tight. And pockets are big enough for my phone. I what more could you want.

I really want to like these shorts but they’re just a weird style. They look great from the front, but the sides and back just look so odd. I wish the middle seam didn’t go all the way around. I think it causes the fabric to bunch up in a weird and unflattering way. The front buttons are real and look great, but they are a pain to fasten. Since the back is elastic I ended up just sliding them on and off. The material is very rough and wrinkles like crazy, which only adds to the unkept look of these. The fabric also has a worn look. I believe that’s intentional, but I feel after multiple washes, it will just start looking old and kinda rough. As for size, I ordered a medium based on the size chart. I wish I had sized down. Maybe that would help with the overall frumpiness. These are so wide in the hips. Since the waist is elastic, it gives you room to size down if you wanted. For reference, I’m 5’5, 140lbs, 29in waist, 37 hips and a 36B. I usually wear between a 6-8.

The material is a little thin but it’s nice and comfy. I’ve worn it buttoned and unbuttoned with the bottom tied around my waist. I’m 5”5’ and 200lbs and purchased the Beau Blue in XXL. I’m typically a XXL and would say it’s true to size. The shirt is a little roomy and almost oversized.

Love this top. The material is really soft, not denim - it’s chambray but it gives the denim look without being hot or stiff. I’m 5’2” 125lbs wearing my true size small. I ended up ordering in 2 more colors.

I am 5'3" and 130 lbs for reference. Usually a size 4 numeric or size small standard. I am 1000% in love with these pants! I needed some new ones for work and in general I love a straight leg pant. Naturally I scrolled through everything Amazon has to offer and finally landed on these. They're perfect!! I ordered a size small. The fit is just right, not too big and not too tight anywhere. I like the amount of rise at the stomach, comes just below my belly button. They are a relaxed straight leg and the length is just right for my size (not too long - which I'm always worried about). The fabric is great, it's not super thick or stiff but also not really thin - seems pretty durable for days I need to be in the warehouse. I work with 6 other girls on the office side and literally each one has complimented these pants already! I feel like I could dress these up easily for any occasion (date night if I wanted to tighten the string at the ankle and put on heels.... literally I could wear these everywhere!) I'm definitely planning to buy more of these in other colors and just to have backups. If you're still looking for the right pair of cargo pants, you can stop here!

I appreciate reviews when people give their body stats and and the size of the garment they ordered. It makes it so much easier to figure out what size you should order. So I am 5' 1 1/2" tall and weight is 156-lbs. and I ordered a large which fits perfect. I am very short waisted and these sit just slightly below the belly button on me. So I don't know that I would consider these high rise. The fabric has a tiny bit of stretch/give to it but its definitely what I would call a cotton twill. The color is a nice Army Green, lots of nice deep pockets and very comfortable. The washing instructions say to hang dry, but I will probably put them in the dryer on the lowest setting just to fluff. Also my inseam is about 30" and the length is perfect, if you have longer legs these would be too short. I hope this helps.

Be prepared for the compliments! Wow! Absolutely stunning and amazing fit!! The compliments were coming from everywhere as I made my way to a Paparazzi Accessories gala on Aug. 3, 2022 for my High Five Bargain Bling business. Check the Size Chart for a Delicious Sundress! Dokotoo gets my vote for the best styles and construction on Amazon. They consistently deliver a higher quality product and this dress is no different. I have a 37” bust and sized up because I can’t have anything tight across my chest. That was the correct call as it feels great. Even the elasticized smocking in the back is comfortable. This is an adorable style! So flattering and feminine. The entire bodice and down to mid thigh has a lining, so we never have to worry about the dress being see through. The lining as well as the maxi dress is 100% viscose and it is so soft and smooth…and breathable. A natural fiber! Yes! The pink print is simply gorgeous in person. It’s like raspberry sherbet. The other thing that Dokotoo does better than most is their construction. I used to sew professionally and I always check out the inside of the garments I receive. My pet peeves are uncut threads, crooked seams and unfinished edges. I only had to snip one thread on this and all the seams are well finished. This dress should last if the viscose is treated with respect. Cool wash sensitive cycle, low heat dryer for a max of five minutes then hang to dry. If it doesn’t get a shot of heat it will dry somewhat stiff. You can also skip the dryer and use a steamer and it will relax the stiffness. The many folds across the bodice look like they may need some help to lie correctly as the dress dries. It’s probably best to use a hanger with two clips that are normally for pants and skirts. I can’t wait for summer!
