Dress arrived quickly. It was surprisingly not wrinkled and only required hanging to make it 100% wearable. I’m 6ft tall, 215lbs and it fit me perfectly. It’s so comfortable. I wore it to a Mardi Gras ball for five hours and never got uncomfortable. I got so many compliments. It was awesome.

Stunning and Flattering! five HUGE stars! I wanted to have a beautiful gown for my daughter's wedding, and due to having a lot going on leading up to the big event, I didn't have a chance to go out and shop for one. I was honestly panicking. So I began a very intense online search (and I'm pretty sure I have now seen EVERY plus size special event gown that exists on the planet, LOL.) I found a small handful of dresses that I felt would flatter my plus size frame (And round belly), but most were VERY expensive. The one I liked most was around 180 dollars on SALE. But I came across this gorgeous dress, read through the reviews and felt it was worth a shot. At a great price I promise you cannot go wrong with this. I received compliments all night long! I am about 5'5 and I wore flat silver sandals (it was an outdoor evening wedding), and the dress fell right to the tip of my feet. I didn't mind, I loved the length. But if you are my height or shorter, you might want to wear at least a low heel if you don't want it to touch the ground at all. The color is true to the photos. It is a gorgeous inky navy blue, which is especially flattering on fair skin, thought honestly it would be lovely on anyone! I have pretty large arms so the cap sleeves though they did fit, I felt the need to cover up with a nice blue shrug (and it looked lovely). The back is see thru lace (absolutely stunning shimmery lace), so i purchased a navy slip to wear underneath, which solved the problem of having to worry about my bra showing in back. Though I did have my shrug on most of the night, so it wouldn't have mattered! The sweetheart neckline flatters the bosom without showing too much (I wanted to be classy, it was my daughter's wedding afterall!), and I was thrilled with the fit. the high waist allows the skirt to flow and fall in a flattering way that disguises a large belly, while enhancing the breast area. Lovely quality, soft feel, and just perfect. I could not have been happier! In the photos below, please note that the one from the back, I had not pulled the dress back down after riding home, sorry about that! normally it falls beautifully in front and back! Also the first photo taken with my friend best shows the color of the dress. *sample provided for my opinion

So comfortable!! Here’s why I gave this dress five stars: * this is a “step into it and pull it up over your hips and shoulders” kind of dress. Love it! * I like the formfitting bodice, with it’s shirring. * it has pockets!! * do you note that there are little eyelet dots all over the dress in a warm slightly golden green color. It looks very nice on the dress. * I love this style of dress. It is flattering to almost any body. * this is a size large. I normally fit into ladies US size 4 to 6, (5’2”, 110lbs) but I just can’t stand to have things too tight on me. Usually, ordering a size large works well for me. This is a little big, however. But that’s my fault. Still, I’m not going to send it back because it is so comfortable, and it really doesn’t look huge. This hits me in a nice spot at my waist so I won’t complain. BOTTOM LINE: this long dress is a great find for the fall! I think it is very reasonably priced for what you get.

This dress was better than expected. I am a bigger girl. I have triple D's and I am five foot and weigh 230. I order a 24 which translates as a ten in regular sizes. I order a size smaller in the bust because I wanted ''my girls'' to be securely fastened. I will say I put the dress on over my head. But it is a perfect fit and a truly beautiful dress. It compliments my body shape and I feel very confident in it. If you have a larger chest I would definitely order a size smaller to make sure that you feel like you aren't going anywhere. The material of this dress is great and feels just as expensive a $300 dress. HIGHLY RECOMMEND.

Buy this dress! I am almost 5’6”, 140, don’t have a large chest, have a flat butt, and tend to carry a little extra padding around my middle. I am wearing the XL, and felt comfortable, as I don’t want my dress to “fit like a glove” which I find typically means people appear to be trying to shove ten pounds of crap into a five pound bag, if ya get me….This dress is so comfortable, and does well as far as wrinkles go. I love the ruching in the front to help hide my belly rolls. It has a knee high slit on one side, but it is not visible really, unless sitting, and even then, I could still cover my leg. There is a ruffle on the side, which I think is another visual distraction for that mom gut. I received many compliments when I wore this to a wedding. I am wearing 2” heels and the length was perfect.

Beautiful material I am five foot two, and also 169 pounds I ordered a shorter length but the waistband hangs very low because I am very short waisted so it throws the whole style out. It's obvious the pattern is made for taller women, and I was sad that I had to send it back.

Lovely just know what you are getting into I bought this dress in size 14. I am 5'3, 157LB, 36DD. I absolutely love how this dress looks! The fabric is so pretty, the skirt is very full, and it is a lovely design. Since it is a corset back, it is adjustable. BUT, just be aware: - It's as hot AF. I've only worn it about five minutes and it's clear there is NO breathability. You are encased in plastic mesh. - the tie for the corset is not nearly long enough. I've worn corsets for years. You need lots and lots of length to lace it up properly. I plan to purchase several yards of pink ribbon to lace up the back. - you will need help getting into it. There is a corset back which laces past your bum and a modesty panel. You will need someone to help straighten out the modesty panel and lace it up. If you've never worn a corset before, this could be confusing. - the straps are too long and don't stay on. I plan on modifying them.If you can work around these issues, this is a gorgeous dress!

DON'T HESITATE! BUY THIS DRESS! I could not be happier with this dress! For reference, I'm 5'5" and about 220lbs. Based off of my measurements and other reviews saying it runs small, I ordered a size 24. This fits perfectly with room for movement. I also love that I can wear a bra with it, which was an issue with other dresses. It's a little long but heels will help. I wanted a dress that would cover my arms, which are my biggest insecurity. These sleeves are shear but not completely see-through, which I LOVE! I'm absolutely obsessed with the sparkles, too! I uploaded five photos so hopefully I can help another 'thick' girl find the perfect dress. I feel absolutely beautiful, confident and so comfortable!

Pretty & Elegant I felt comfortable in the dress on a hot-humid summer day when it was over 90 degrees outside. I ordered a 16. I am only five feet tall and 173 lbs. I am not very chesty and have a thick waist, but the dress was still flattering. I received several compliments on it at my niece's wedding. It might be too casual for the mother-of-the-bride, but if you're a guest of a wedding and looking for comfort while dancing, you might be happy with this purchase. The jacket drapes nicely and helps hide things a little, but in this picture part of the jacket is tucked behind my brother so you get a fuller view of my stomach. I still wanted to post a picture even though I feel it does not do the dress justice. One more thing, I ordered a pink dress. In person the dress was more of a rose gold, especially the sequences. The sheer portion of the dress is a pinkish/light salmon which I loved. I wore rhinestone shoes and rhinestone earrings which looked lovely with the rose gold hue of this dress.

I had a vision in my Mind about how I wanted to look on my Special Day. When I saw this dress I knew it was the one for Me. The recommendations told me to order a 2xl but I knew with the way that I am shaped that would be too big. So I read the reviews and I just went with my Gut. So In case you are wondering I am 5’3 and I weigh 227lbs (if your thinking that I do not look like, don’t worry no one can ever guess my weight) I don’t like ordering things on line due to the fact that My top half is smaller than my bottom half and it can make buying clothes very annoying. Reading the reviews I got an XL. And Babies Let me tell you Something …. It superseded my expectations because She was perfect. My now Husband always refer to me as his Queen prior to our Nuptials, but I really felt Like One when I Put This dress on. He already looks as me with great passion but On this day he looked deep into my Soul as we vowed to love one another for the rest of our lives. The quality of this dress is Tremendous. It has great stretch to fit your form perfectly (I didn’t unzip it to put it on, I just put it over my head) I would recommend going down a size if you want that perfect fit. I give it Five Stars. Whom ever designed this dress did it with Compassion, and they take pride in the Craft that they possess because like I stated This Dress superseded All of my expectations. I received so many wonderful Compliments telling me how elegantly Beautiful I looked. This truly was the perfect Dress❤️

Wish I ordered Smaller Size :( I needed a dress for a wedding, I liked the color and style of this dress so decided to try it out. The color is a very true purple, couldn't capture it in the photo cause of the lighting but it's very pretty. However I'm 5"7 and I ordered a size 6, I definitely should've ordered a size 4 cause the fit isn't flattering at all. It sort of just hangs on me like a potato sack and I think I could take it in a few inches. It's also very long, as I said I'm 5"7 and in the photo I'm wearing a five inch heel with a one inch platform, the dress still skims the ground.

Worth the price - size up! I ordered this dress in the blue and the green color in a size extra large according to the size chart. I’m normally a 14–16 and figured this XL would fit. The XL was tight so I purchased a XXL, which honestly was smaller than the XL. This blew my mind so I ordered another XL and a XXL thinking I just happen to get an off size or mislabeled dress. The same thing happened where the XXL was smaller than the XL. Baffled at this sizing issue I decided to try my luck at ordering an XXXL. This fit beautifully and comfortable like a typical 14-16 dress does. I didn’t want too skin tight because I wanted to be able to move and sit without feeling uncomfortable, that’s what the larger size provided. Through my trial and error purchasing multiple sizes I’m happy with the 3X despite the tag size being larger than I wanted but the only person who sees the inside tag is ME. I wore this for a holiday event and received many compliments. I paired it with green plaid high heels and a Louis Vuitton purse and literally no one would’ve guessed in 1 million years that it was a $40 Amazon dress. For the quality of the fabric, the appearance and fit, once I found the appropriate size, I definitely give it a five star. I have even washed it and cold water by itself on gentle cycle and hung it dry. It came out perfect and I can definitely see myself wearing this dress again this holiday season. I would recommend sizing up one to two sizes and getting at least two of the colors because they are very gorgeous in person with the velvety texture, the blue and green or vibrant perfect for the holiday season but can be worn to other occasions and considering the orange and red colors as well. Hope this helps you with your purchase For reference - My normal sizing - I’m 5’8 200lbs a pretty standard 14 and 38DD the best fit was a 3X in this particular dress model

This Dress Is Everything And Pockets💖 I Purchased This Dress For A Wedding Absolutely LoVe The Dress. I Got The XL Size Because I'm 6'0 and 190 lbs. I Wish The Sleeves Had Elastic That Way It Would Stay In Place And Not Slide Down Showing The Cuff Anyways With That Being Said It's Still A Five Star Dress

Lovely but lays weird at my neck like I want to love this dress so much! I think the quality is excellent, the fabric is heavy enough to be draped. The pockets are perfectly placed and the length on me is great for wearing with my wedge sandals now or later in the fall/winter with boots. My only complaint is the neckline is weird. I think it has to do with the rooshing Around the front of the sleeves. The sleeves are not gathered, . It’s the body of the dress where it attaches to the sleeves and that seems to push The shoulder seams back off the natural should line just a little bit, causing the scoop in the back to be lower than the scoop in the front. I keep trying to pull it forward and it stays for a minute, but then tends to go back again. I got this from an influencer’s daily post, and paid under $20 for it, so I’ll probably keep it for travel. I think it will easily roll up in a suitcase and with the scarf. I probably won’t notice how the neckline lays so much. I’ve even thought maybe it was intentionally made that way, but it’s not that low, to be like a ballet neck where the back is intentionally lower than the front . Otherwise, a great dress I’m 63 years old, 5 foot five, 145 pounds and a size small fit grade.

BUY NOW!!! Ok, this is a long, somewhat in depth review for the dress and five different colors. We are renewing our vows for our 25th and I want something that isn't wedding dressy, something that I know I'll wear again. I'll provide size info and then my opinion on the dresses themselves. I didn't wear anything under the dresses because I didn't have to and I wanted to see what they'd look like without. And omg, you don't NEED anything under this dress because it will give you the shape of a goddess! Also, I only order with Prime because Amazon is just too much of a gamble to not have that free return guarantee. My stats are: 5'4", roughly 132+/- depending on what I nom nom nom on, 34-25-35, size small/4, and my current bras are 36 DDD. They don't match my measurements but it is the bra size that fits me. Idk, my ladies are large-large and every piece of clothing that I own that covers them is stretch fabric so they fit! This is THE dress, gorgeous, versatile, and makes you look like you exercise more and eat less. So far I have ordered the beige, red, black, royal blue, and both wine colors. All colors were in a small, all had the same thick fabric and nothing showed through any of them. I did not have a gapping issue with the bust as some women have (but that's due to the girls' size). I didn't take pictures of all the dresses because I forgot to. The beige, red, and black all came in a plastic bag with a zipper that was clearly labeled with the sizes, the manufacturer, and the color, tissue paper wrapping the dresses, and a piece of foam wrapper around the top of the zippers so they wouldn't create an indent in the fabric. The royal blue and both wines were in a plastic bag that had to be torn or cut open, did not have any identifying stickers on the bag, and did not have any sort of protective tissue paper or anything over the zippers. None of the dresses had a book at the top and they do need one so plan on that super easy, super fast fix. Only the black dress had hanging ribbons sewn onto the dress, this was missing on all other dresses. I think it would make it somewhat difficult to hang the dress without those ribbons since the halter would stretch out and using a hanger with clips on the top will eventually create a permanent indent in the fabric. I guess they could be folded? But who does that with a dress? Anyway, moving on... The beige leaned towards pink. The red is an orange-red and not a true red or a red with blue undertones. The black is a true, deep black. The royal blue is a gorgeous, saturated blue that looked exactly as advertised. Although my pictures don't reflect it due to poor lighting and camera skills both wine colors are *exactly* the same shade and fabric content. The beige, red, black, and one of the wine colors all fit the same and as I expected a body con dress in a heavy stretch fabric should. The royal blue and one of the wine dresses were tighter, the royal blue to the point where I thought it might be an XS but there is no identifying size anywhere. I could get it on and zipped but it was noticably smaller. These are very much like tight wiggle dresses from the 50's in that you need to take very short, ladylike strides (which can be super sexy). All the dresses came to mid-calf on me and the short ruffle hem is a fantastic addition that gives the dress a lot of personality and flirtiness. I'm not sure what the difference is, but I question if all of these dresses were made by the same manufacturer due to the differences in packaging, the care taken with the packing, the way the dresses fit, and which dresses were consistent in size compared to those that weren't. Maybe it's just my snobby imagination but the dresses that were packed better all seem slightly superior. They were most definitely the most consistent of the seven I ordered. So far the black is winning. The red is just not the right color for my pale skin, there's something about the wine dresses that I'm not loving, the beige is all right but kind of expected, and I would be keeping the blue if it had been one of the better packed dresses that were consistent in size. I have time so I'm considering ordering another small to see if it's any different than the one sitting on my kitchen table waiting to be returned. I had ordered other bandages dresses from this company, and while they were also fantastic, this one gives the silhouette I'm looking for: classy while also being sexy, flirty, and ever so slightly suggestive because the shape this gives you in AH-MAH-ZINGGG!!! I don't think you can go wrong ordering any of the dresses from Meilun, some are just better than others. I order a lot on Amazon and these are easily some of the absolute best clothing items I've purchased!

Needed adjustments but good product Overall this was an amazing dress, came in later than expected but still on time thankfully. Went to prom with it and got told by a lot of people that it was a very pretty dress. Was kinda worried cause I've seen very few lighter women wearing this dress, but it came out great. The reason it's getting a 4 instead of a five is because there were a few small things. For one the big poofy sleeves are huge, like way bigger than the pictures made them look and they are very tight and uncomfortable. For two the wiring in the bra is really pointy and makes the boobs look awkward. When those are taken out, the dress looks a lot better. I was also worried the dress was going to be very short, due to my height of nearly 6 foot in heels. However, it was way longer than I thought. So long that I couldn't walk in it and we ended up cutting it shorter. Overall though it's an amazing dress. Very pretty for the price.

Perfect fit! ....and needs to be hemmed. Really enjoyed wearing this dress! I'm 5'8", 225lbs. I purchased a 3x. WARNING it's meant to be hemmed to the proper length. Therefore, It was probably about five inches too long to be worn as is. Otherwise, I was delighted!

Decent for the price The design elements of this dress are great. The faux wrap of the skirt with draping conceals the mid-section well. The quality could definitely be better. The bust is tighter than expected. The dress is only partially lined which makes it feel cheaply done. The bust is lined and the skirt is lined about half way down, so the midsection and mid thigh down are unlined. I don’t think it would be as obvious in a darker color, but the partial lining really takes away from the quality of the dress. I otherwise would have given this dress five stars. I am happy with the fit and the dress is comfortable. The zipper seems low quality also, but it hasn’t given me issues as of yet. This item runs smaller than the sizing recommendations. I ordered a Large plus and my measurements are 36 bust, 30-31 waist and I typically wear a size 10. I’m 5”3 and the dress falls mid calf. Overall, I like the dress for its design and comfort, but sizing runs small and the quality needs improvement. Hope this helps!

Comfortable enough fabric but the chest button sits a little weird and skirt is way too long. This HDLTE long dress is made of a fabric that's comfortable enough for my sensitive skin. Other things I like about this dress: -- The purple color is dark and deep. -- The skirt has a nice flow to it. -- the long sleeves are comfortable. -- The fabric has some stretch to it. Things I don't like about this dress: -- I don't like the wrinkly elastic in the back. It cheapens the look. -- The waist sits a little too high in the front. -- Another thing about the waist is that it rides wayyy up with my movements and I have to keep adjusting it. -- The skirt is laughably too long. I'm 5'5" and this skirt is just too long. Please make long skirts just a hint shorter for us shorter girls. Sorry I couldn't get a pic of the full length with my bathroom counter in the way. -- The snap button on the chest sits weird and does a small peekaboo thing that I hate. Also, I don't know how well the snap button will hold up if someone prefers to wear tighter dresses across the chest. The v-neck sinks too low on me as well. So, even though this dress is comfortable to wear against my skin, it has more bad qualities than good for me, unfortunately. If those quirks were fixed, this would be a five star because it is a nice faux wrap design.

Great dress, bad packaging! This is a review from a plus-sized person, which I am considered even though it's just my chest. ^^; The dress is great, no stretch and completely opaque. It's made from a strudy uniform type material. I'm 5'5", 190ish pounds and a 40 I cup, and the 3XL has room in the chest area still. It's flattering and cute! The shipping was fast but I expected a mailer. Nope! They just slapped a label on the plastice packaging and sent it out. I would have rated this five stars except anyone could have stolen this dress at anytime.

Super Great Dress in a Pinch , Has Slight Defects You Can Fix Was in a rush to get a dress less than 24 hours before I needed to fly out of town for a formal wedding. I bought this dress + five other options, and this one was by far the nicest one. I am 5' 7.25" tall, 145 pounds, and measurements are 36-28-38. I bought a size M and felt it was really big in the chest area - with the cups of the dress sown in a very low location. It did fit me just right in the hips though - so I don't think I could have sized down to have the chest area be smaller. I am a 34 D normally. Because the cups were sown sort of low and in, I had to bring the dress up quite a bit with the adjustable straps so the dress had more of an empire waist look for me rather than sitting at my natural waist, as pictured. I also ended up wearing a push up bra with double-sided tape to get the line of the dress over my chest to look right. I wore short heels ( >3 inches) and the length on this dress was fine. If you are shorter this dress may not work. Definitely plan on getting a push-up/padded adhesive bra for this one - the strapless bra I had wasn't low cut enough in the center. I also had to safety pin the slit in two spots to get it to lay in a more flattering manner - without a pin it would have been really revealing while moving. I also wasn't wild about the straps - they were really plain - so I just wore my hair down to cover them. You could wear a wrap or shawl of some kind to accomplish the same thing. Overall, this was a great dress with a really pretty material for the price. It wasn't perfect in terms of the sewing, but I fixed this with some pinning, padding and double-sided tape, and dressed it up with accessories and in the end I felt like I was one of the best dressed people at the wedding.

Event Dressing Perfection!! When I looked in the mirror after getting trying this dress on, I had to take a step back and give myself a mental high five. This dress is soooooo good! The velvet is sumptuous and luxurious. The color I received is a deep midnight navy. The length is almost to the floor on me. The beading at the waist really steps the style up a notch. There's also ruching that snatches your waist and makes you look like you lost a few pounds. That's really hard to do in a fabric like velvet. There are cups sewn into the bust, but I didn't want to take a chance on them. I'm wearing a regular bra with the straps pushed down. Even though this is a strapless dress, you won't get the dreaded armpit fat. You can adjust the fabric to cover what you would rather hide. There's a side split that shows just the right amount of leg. The overall fit runs a full size small, though the fabric has stretch (but not much). I usually wear a 10. The 12 just barely fits. I definitely could have used a support garment to smooth my back fat. Overall, this is a GORGEOUS dress that will be the hit of any event. You could never be a wallflower in this dress. For fit reference, I'm 5'6", 153lbs and a 34G bra size. I'm wearing the 12. I usually wear a 10. Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided makes your decision a little easier.

Strange Fit! RETURNED! --If this review helped you, please click " "-- OK, so I'm going to call this dress Monet. From afar, it looks so cute...you get close up and notice a lot of strange things about it. The dress came with certain parts of the fabric discolored slightly. I thought it was because of the folding and tried to rub it out with my hands but it didn't work. You could still see it in the light. The very top of the tube part of the dress flared out...it looked strange and you could see right down into my bra if you were taller than me and looked down. It was like it was sewn funny. The bottom was way too long and made it hard to walk, too! I will say that the dress was slimming - a lot more slimming than I thought. I didn't need to wear a shaper. It could have been the color but that was a positive aspect about the dress for me. I'm 5'6", 140 lbs, size 4/6, and curvy. I ordered a medium and it fit fine. I could have squeezed into a small but it would have been like a sausage casing. Meh, save your money. It is way too expensive for some off-brand Amazon dress anyways and it isn't a great fit. --For more Amazon reviews, follow @CassandraMercedes on Instagram--

Decent but not the best (For reference, I am 5’1 43” bust, 37” waist, 47 1/2” hips) Bought this dress to wear to my niece’s princess themed party. I thought it was pretty, but I was disappointed in the color choices. The fabric is thin, cheap-feeling (to be expected honestly) and staticky, and the dress itself was a bit too long for my taste. I felt it covered my body shape a bit too much and wasn’t as flattering as I hoped. I think the dress would be more flattering if the waist had elastic instead. The chest part has a button for you to keep on or unbutton for less coverage. I kept mine buttoned in the photos. It is a fun and flowy dress, and it fit as expected, but I think I will be returning for a different one that better matches my body type. :)

Decent but not the best (For reference, I am 5’1 43” bust, 37” waist, 47 1/2” hips) Bought this dress to wear to my niece’s princess themed party. I thought it was pretty, but I was disappointed in the color choices. The fabric is thin, cheap-feeling (to be expected honestly) and staticky, and the dress itself was a bit too long for my taste. It is a fun and flowy dress, and it fit as expected, but I think I will be returning for a different one that better matches my body type. :)

(I am 5’2 and 125 lbs for reference) I thought this was so cute but it is very long without any heels. As you can see in the picture, I have it ruched up. I would order it again! No padding or breast support- need strapless bra.

cute dress! (I am on the left, with my hair in front). I ordered this dress for a friends wedding, and it has become an essential piece of my wardrobe. I can see myself wearing this dress for multiple events! The slit wasn’t too high, and fell at an appropriate length. Same with the open back. This dress was thin, on the silky side, but very flattering and comfortable. I am 5’4 145lbs 34D, I ordered a medium, and it fit perfect.

Love this dress! (Measurements at the end) I really love this dress, it’s one of my favorites! The red is so vibrant and the style gives a sense of an older era. The pockets are so big too! The dress goes just a bit below my knees. I also wore a petticoat with this to make it poof out, it’s a bit flat without one. The only thing I don’t like is that for the neckline, when I bend low or over, it shows a lot more than I like. If I had more in the chest area it’d probably fit better there. Also the material itself is just a bit cheap-feeling. Overall though, this is such a nice dress and I got many compliments on it! Measurements - Waist: 27” Bust: 33.5” Hips: 32” Height: 5’3”

Pretty! ****the missing star is only for the way the fabric feels, not how it looks or fits. I love this dress, I just wish (and expected) the fabric were higher quality satin for $53. It looks amazing and my boyfriend freaked out seeing me in it. Also, please excuse the fact that it needs to be ironed badly in the pic There’s almost zero stretch, so make sure you’re paying attention to the waist size in the size chart since it’s a back zip. The bust has play/adjustability from the tie-back strap, so that’s not as important to get exactly right. I’m 5’5, 24” waist, 32f and this fit well :) Zero stretch also means it’s not a dress that as easy to take off running in, since full leg movement is kind of restricted. I’m new to wearing dresses (I prefer to live in athleisure), so this is not the comfiest for me, but I still love it for special occasions.

Beautiful for price- read the review! **Update** The bump has grown and am at 35 weeks. Still fits like a dream! Did our maternity photos and am so happy! You could only see a little of my underwear line but hardly. And I’ll keep this for future events because it’s not a maternity dress, just super stretchy. Yeah! 4 stars because it doesn’t look too much like the Amazon ad BUT I do love it. **Ordered a small for being petite** I had bought this because I am 1) short- 5 feet tall, 2) short torsoed, 3) usually smaller breasts- I have 34B, and 4) have a smaller bump- 32 weeks but measuring at 29 weeks. I needed something that hugged me but stretched...the other dress from another retailer looked like a bag and was quickly sent back. Pre- pregnancy I weighed 120 and currently weigh 137, I have thicker thighs and a bigger booty (peach butt). I was a 32A pre-pregnancy and 34B now and the top is only a little loose. This is like polyester stretch- so it has a cottony feel but super stretchy and has the length that I need, but again I am short. **If you are curvier or taller, I would size up.** Being pregnant causes the zipper to bunch in the back, but for photos I don’t care. **I do have cellulite!** You can see my big booty undy lines but hubby said I didn’t need to wear the shapers since he couldn’t see anything- even when I stood in the sun (I would say there’s somewhat of a thickness but not too heavy). If I had gotten any lighter colors, I’d wear a shaper (just for my own self confidence). This is for my maternity shoot in 3 weeks and will definitely still use since there’s a lot of stretch and looks beautiful on. Can’t beat the price either! I’ll update the review once we get our photos taken.

Beautiful (See through) **Update** It was perfect for my shower! I bought maternity shapewear (nude) to wear underneath which kept it from being see-through. I guessed the size, it is beautiful, comfortable and light weight. The only upsetting part is it is see through. Luckily I noticed when the sunlight shined on me in the bathroom so I quickly ordered maternity shapewear for underneath. Other than that I think this dress is gorgeous and flattering and is perfect pregnant or not! Don’t mind my dirty mirrors please, I swear they were clean yesterday 😂 ALSO** It lands right above my feet too so perfect length. However, if shorter or not pregnant the dress will most likely be longer. I am 36 weeks pregnant and 5’7

Pretty cute *EDITS/ADDITIONS TO REVIEW* Originally ordered in maroon/burgundy color & loved dress so I ordered red brown for a summer wedding. Overall I think these dresses are so cute and classy. Each time I’ve purchased this dress I’ve bought it on sale and feel like it warrants the sale price. I do love these dresses but I’m not sure I’d say they’re worth ~$50 regularly but you can decide for yourself. I will note fabric is thin & I think it’s best suited for a warmer occasion. I know a lot of wrap dresses can make dancing & moving around a bit scandalous but I haven’t worn these out yet to test. I do feel like they wrap far enough over you don’t have to stress too much since there’s a good amount of overlap. My only complaint is no hanger straps on these dresses. Medium maroon/burgundy review - Top is a bit baggier than expected. But I think it’s pretty flattering even on my smaller chest. The fabric is thin & has a satin feel but no sheen. Overall I really like this dress. Great length on my 5’5 height, & very flattering over all. Do really like that it has a side zipper & you don’t have to shimmy it over your body. Small and medium red brown review - the color is more of a dusty pink than a red or brown but I went off of previous reviews and chose this color anyway for a summer wedding. I preferred the fit of medium over small & if I order more colors in future I’ll order mediums. The small fit my body fine (all photos are in size mediums) but the elastic in the neckline was stretched out in the small and made the top slightly uncomfortable. Overall still really like these dresses and would order again. The true test though would be wearing them out for the night and seeing how they hold up.

Perfect *please excuse the fact that it needs to be ironed in the pic I love this dress. It’s gorgeous, it can be sinched in a four-point corset, and it’s true to size chart. The main part of the dress is a zip, but there are two loops on each side of the back of the dress and an included string of the same satin fabric to make it even more adjustable. Very little stretch to the fabric, so it can get tight on the thighs taking long steps, and it’s definitely important to size right. Not a dress you can take off running in. I’m not one to wear anything without a bra (32f and need all the support I can get), but I felt comfortable not wearing one with this. My boyfriend also loves it :’)

Loooooong *Pre apologies for the not great photos, I was obviosly not the center of focus on my sister's wedding. Full disclosure, i'm wearing a body shaper that goes from the underwire of my bra, to mid thigh* I wore this for my sister's wedding in early may. The color was perfect, the fit was comfortable, the dress was just 3 or 4 inches too long for me. (I'm 5'3" and 225lbs, 40K bust, size 18-20 pants.) I just folded, pinned, and sewed around to bring the hem up. The material was light in weight, breathable, and not see through. Not warm enough to spend much time outside in early spring in Colorado. (When I tried the dress on, I was wearing an unlined bra, and was told you could see my n!p outline, but I wore a lined/padded bra day of so you could not see that.) I really appreciate that the dress came with a tube top for modesty, I did use this in these photos. It covered the band of my bra all around my back. I chose to do a one shoulder style, by twisting the two lengths of 'strap' and wrapping around my waist and tying in the back. I received a lot of compliments, and will likely wear this again if I need to dress up for anything.

Perfect fitting • I’m 4’10 short • 125-127lbs with a mom pooch • 34D chest size • pear shaped • Wearing high heels in all of the pictures shown, except the mirror pictures. I was barefoot in the mirror pictures. The dress was under my feet without heels, and barely touching the floor with 4 or 5 inch heels. I walked without stepping on the dress so that’s a huge plus. I’m definitely going to go get it hemmed just a couple inches, bc I love the long elegant look ❤️ Went to a church event, the back was a bit too revealing so I bought the white covering from Macys, & added the golden belt with white pearls . Wore gold heels, which you barely saw. Dress is super comfy, material is thick, please please PLEASE wear a girdle/shapewear. Many of the reviews make the dress look bad bc the women are not wearing shapers, THIS MAKES ALL THE DIFFERENCE. VERSATILE!! I wanted modesty so I wore the dress up & covering the shoulders, but it looks SO BEAUTIFUL with one shoulder showing. Or you can show both, beautiful either ways. Great quality, zipper was easy to zip to by myself, easy to slip in and out of , very breathable, and made my body shape look good. I don’t have a big bottom but this dress made me look like I have some junk in the trunk lol . I posted all the different angles of the dress , I wouldn’t recommend getting this dress! I didn’t face to iron or steam it, though I should have on the top part. But the packaging was great, neatly folded and not just thrown in the bag like other dresses from Amazon

True to size! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 I really love this dress and I was so happy that it is available in long sleeves! I went to a wedding on the east coast and it was still pretty chilly at night so the sleeves were great and I didn’t have to keep messing with a shall or jacket all night. I’m 5’3” and weigh roughly 165. I bought a large and it fit like a GLOVE!!! I wash it in the machine but hang to dry, seems like the type of material that might tighten up too much in a hot dryer. I will buy this in short sleeves and different prints for the summer. Also, super nice for dancing with a split hi-low effect, it shows all the good bits and none of the bad. Almost forgot to mention, I’m a 36 DD up top, just enough room for the gurlz!

Very nice dress for the price! $32? Yes please! Nice material, not too thick or thin and beautiful design and fit! I'm 5"4, 128lb and ordered size small. It fit perfect, not tight or loose. If you are skinnier than me, size small might be too big though. I wish it was back zipper instead of side! Back zipper is so much easier to wear than side zipper. I needed a classy but not boring dress for upcoming event and ordered a couple of dresses from Amazon. I really liked this dress but my husband liked the other dress better so unfortunately I'll have to return this dress but wanted to share the picture of actual dress. (Sorry you see a lot of white spots in my close-up pic! I need to clean my mirror...lol) It is Amazing and kind of crazy that you can buy nice dresses for such amazing price at Amazon now days! You don't have to drive to the mall and spend $$$ at department store anymore! I have to give 4 stars instead of 5 because dress smelled perfume. I do understand sometimes you receive the clothes someone returned but smelling perfume or see the make-up marks around the neck wouldn't be appreciated....(but happens all the time!)

Weird smell, decent quality, super long. 1. As soon as I opened the bag there was a very strong fishy smell. It did not come out the first time I washed it but the smell did go away after the second wash with a cup of white vinegar added. 2. The bodice or top is very sturdy and feels well made. However, the ruched waist band detail was glued in place on the right side and the glue started peeling after the first time I washed it. Not noticeable when being worn. 3. There is no zipper. You have to lace yourself into and out of this dress. 4. It is SUPER long. I'm 5ft 8in and wearing 5in heels in the pics. The sleeves trail about 1ft past the train of the dress. 5. It has pockets! But that's kind of a down side for this dress because of the way it interferes with the silhouette of the dress and makes an unattractive pooch on either hip. I tried to capture that in the pics. 6. The mesh in the front is not unflattering or awkward looking. I like it, as it adds to the support and sturdiness of the bustline. 7. It's actually made of a chiffon type material and NOT a cheap tulle material. Overall I'm very happy with it and think it will make a great halloween costume after I shorten the sleeves. It's a good deal overall and fits nicely. I would recommend buying it.

Excellent! 48 years old 5’3 158lbs at the moment :( measurements 39-31-41 and needed a dress for my nephew’s wedding. I bought a large which pains me to buy as the weight has been creeping on but I realize how height, weight, measurements, and size details are in a review. I was concerned the fabric wouldn’t be nice, a lot of the time the material is a little too t-shirt-like for my taste (too casual) and I definitely didn’t want to go in the opposite direction and getting something in a satin finish… this is a perfect middle ground. Soft and comfortable and polished without being shiny. The fit is perfect and fairly flattering even for my extra padded areas. Very pleased, may buy in another color but not sure I have a need for it. I just want another! So cute. Go for it! I think you’ll also be glad you did.

5 stars. I’d give it more if I could. I bought this for a formal attire wedding and received so many compliments. I happily told everyone who would listen it was from Amazon and cost less than $50. The material has enough stretch that it clings in all the right places but isn’t too tight. Excellent quality also, no see through issues, good weight, and isn’t the kind of fabric thatwrinkles or puckers. It’s ribbed material I’m sure you’d be able to notice in lighter colors but not an issue with black. I am 5’7 and 165 lbs. My measurements are 41, 31, 41 and a size large was perfect. I possibly could have gone down a size based on how the top fit but it didn’t bother me at all. After losing about 100 pounds I do have a belly pooch but it was not noticeable in this dress. I’m serious, buy the dress.

Great Value for Price; Very Comfortable 5’ 4.5”, 145 lbs ish, athletic build. Purchased medium. The navy blue is a great shade - not too dark so it looks black, and also not too bright/cobalt. Incredibly stretchy all over. I probably could have sized down to a small, however a medium was comfortable and didn’t cling anywhere. The material is a little thin so you’ll need seamless undergarments (or nothing) if you want the dress to fall smooth. The neckline shows regular bra straps, so go strapless/stick on/nothing/or do you. Thigh split on the left leg came up a few inches above my knee, but didn’t feel too revealing when walking or sitting. Dress was a bit long on me (5’4.5”, with 3” heels) so it drags in the back when I walk. Because if the slit, I don’t step on it when walking, so I won’t be getting it hemmed. Overall, great value for the price. The material seems like it should hold up a few washes but may pill over time and will definitely snag if caught on something (jewelry, benches, etc.). Some wrinkles after hanging to dry, but they steamed out easily.

Soft like satin/silk 5' 8" 198lbs. Hello all. I'm writing this review to help you decide. First I am 6 months post partum and not breastfeeding. I went down naturally to 198, I gained weight, and now I'm back to 198. I don't have an hour glass figure and have a wide waist naturally. For the picture I am not wearing a control top, which I probably will get a control top with shorts for the dresses. I am wearing a molded (padded) underwire bra. I washed the clothes on cold delicate cycle and dried on delicate cycle, then I ironed them. I am writing multiple reviews for clothes I bought for prime day so this part is the informational section I am putting on all the reviews. I measure around 43"over bust-36" narrowest part of waist-46"widest part of hips. Not too difficult to iron. Very soft like satin or silk. I bought XXL just in case. I'll definitely be buying XL once I lose 10lbs. Very purple compared to the picture on amazon.

Perfect LBD 5’0”, size 16-18 depending on brand, 38C It fit so well! There’s a bit of stretch so there’s wiggle room and it was comfortable. There’s no boning. It hit right at the knee even though I’m short so no hemming was needed. No alterations were needed at all actually. I received this dress a day before a photo session and I was fortunately able to wear it straight out of the packaging, so the size chart provided is accurate and there was no weird smell that clothes purchased online sometimes have. As someone in between straight and plus sizing, I’m self conscious about my weight and but I thought I looked good in it despite it being a sheath-style (A-lines typically work better to hide the belly and flatter larger figures, which I normally prefer). I’m 31 and it doesn’t look too young and trendy, but it doesn’t look too old or matronly either. I think it’s a great design for anyone regardless of age or weight. I don’t have an LBD so this is perfect for dressy-casual events, not too plain and not over the top.

THESE SEQUINS WILL RIP YOUR ARMS UP 5’2” 175lbs. This dress is pretty and I really wanted to wear it for this Christmas party. I tried wearing something with sleeves to go over the dress but the damage had already been done. I had this dress on for maybe 15 minutes and the sequins were just cutting into my skin. If your arms touch your sides when you’re relaxed and you don’t plan on wearing something under or over with sleeves you will regret it. Yes it’s a shiny pretty dress but it is not worth the pain I promise. It is also extremely short in the front and if I didn’t put a petticoat on underneath you would’ve easily seen my flower. I honestly don’t understand all the outstanding reviews, what about everyone’s arms?!

I got a large and sizing down or up would not fit for sure. My one complaint is that I feel like the seam on the backside is a tad asymmetrical, like I have to keep twisting the pants so it will be in the right place. Beautiful dress According to the size chart I am a small. That’s what I ordered and it fit well, aside from being a little big in the bust. I’m 5’10” 125# 32B and it just skimmed the top of my feet, so definitely on the long side. I ordered the standard “off the rack” dress rather than the custom altered dress because of my time constraints, and waited 5-6 weeks with standard shipping. The color was true to the listing, and the dress is heavy and expensive in both look and feel, with a nice, full skirt. (And pockets!!!) I wasn’t able to tell from the pictures that the sleeves are see through, which unfortunately won’t work for me, so I’ll be returning. But I won’t hesitate to use this seller again when I have more time to custom order and get it more fitted in the bust for me.

According to the size chart, I was supposed to ... According to the size chart, I was supposed to fit in a size 6. That was too large, so I tried a 6 petite. Again, too large. So I tried a 4. Too large. Eventrually I found that a 2 was my size. I am 5'4.5" and weigh 125 lbs. The 2 fit perfectly. Also, the beading on the 1st three dresses that I purchased was not silver, it was a royal blue, which gave the whole dress a blue/grey effect. The size 2 that I eventually ended up with had silver beading (which is what I wanted anyways) and was much more sparkly than the other 3 dresses. Not sure what makes the difference since I ordered the same dress 4 times with sizes being the only variation. One last thing to consider. I wore this as a bridesmaid for a wedding and found the after that the beading is coming off in multiple places. The dress does come with a small bag of extra beading, but that just shows that they expect the beading to fall off because of the fragile state of the dress. Even after all this, I'm still giving it a 5 star rating because the dress is simply gorgeous! I was so sparkly and classy. It was very flattering. Worth the hassle. (I am in the middle of this pic; the ribbon was added)

Adrianna Pappel always makes a stunning dress, and this dress IS stunning. I chose the gunmetal colored dress in size 8, and as usual it fits very true to size. I'm 5'4" and 155lbs, and wear a size 8 in regular clothes. I'm wearing a corset and shapewear to hide my tummy, and as form fitting as this dress is, you couldn't tell what I was attempting to hide under it. It is VERY long (I'm in 5" heels) but I never tripped over the length, nor did anyone stand on the train, remarkably! The entire night I received a TON of compliments. I've pictured another dress by Adrianna Pappel (blue) in a side by side of this dress for comparison. Between the two, I'm thrilled I went with this one! As usual with this designer, the beading is quite detailed and sparkly, which makes the dress heavier than most. I happen to LOVE the weight of her dresses and wear it more like armor than something dainty. Highly recommend!

Love Love Love my BEAUTIFUL $40 wedding dress!!!! After 10 years together, we wanted to get married on Leap Day, and decided elope to Vegas 10 days before. Well, Amazon prolly hates me, bc I ordered (and now returned) about 20 outfits/ dresses,(not to mention all the shopping IRL) trying desparately to find the pefect one...and then.... I felt like I struck gold with this dress! I'm not sure if you'd call it off white or a soft white, the color was pretty. The cut was very flattering on me- it played up my boobs and legs ( I carry all my weight in the belly so, yeah). I'm 5'7", 163, and I wore an XL. It has a nice weight, not like a true wedding dress, but not at all flimsy like some others I tried. One of my bracelets did keep getting caught on the lace, but it was maybe the wrong bracelet to wear. Now, you'll see I have a photo of the back of it. The dress did totally fit me, HOWEVER this is what happens when you can't zip it yourself, then forget to ask hubby, who never says anything bc he thinks thats how the dress is supposed to be. And he was right, it didnt look bad, lol pretty funny. I wore a cropped jean jacket for some photos and that looked cute as well. Highly recommend this bargain of a dress, esp for a 2nd wedding.... Looking back, Im sorry I didnt also try this on in the gray or pink, that wouldve been really cute also.

STUNNING. Amazon for the SAVE!!! After a small fiasco when the department store i had ordered a very expensive M.O.T.B dress sent the WRONG SIZE and had no more in my size, I panicked! I was left thinking only 3 weeks to the wedding Amazon was my only hope. I didn't have much faith so I ordered 6 dresses in different sizes--just in case. One had to fit and not look cheap. I crossed my fingers and Amazon CAME THRU! I ordered 3 of these dresses: two in black/gold in two different sizes and this gem in gold. I have to say THESE DRESSES ARE STUNNING!!!! I'm sad to have to return this gold dress (not because it wasn't beautiful and didn't fit but because it's too close to the wedding parties dresses) but the black and gold? OMG...breathtaking! I felel and look like a princess! And I didn't even open the other dresses--I found my PERFECT dress at a fraction of the original mis-sizes dress I had order i had bought. For the record, I am 5'11" and between a 16-18. I was able to comfortably fit into an XL. Perfect coverage for my upper arms and because it's a semi formal evening wedding at a museum, this color us perfect! It's high quality, doesn't require any altering. Secretly, I wish I had somewhere to wear the gold dress because I'd keep it if I could justify wearing it again! (Would cleaning the house in this gown be over the top? 😂) It's absolutely worth e ery penny. Made extremely well, not too low cut and it's appropriately long enough. I am so happy and a bit sad to have to send back the other dresses but thanks to Amazon for again SAVING THE DAY!!!!

Yet another big bust fail. After downloading the size chart, it clearly states that an XL bust is 48 inches - this is not correct. I am a 42G bust and could not zip it over my chest. It was so tight but when I nearly got it zipped it was near suffocating me. Not to mention the pleat-like draping on the bust looks really awkward. Like. Really really. And the points sit directly at my nips - which is even weirder for a dress that’s supposed to look more classic. The fabric does feel better quality than most clothing here but there is almost zero stretch so it feels very rigid on. In the pictures this dress looks beautiful, in person, it’s bunchy and awkward. I’m sure it is beautiful for small or average sized busts, but I would not recommend for any big bust gals. It’s not it. Sadly this dress is yet another thing I’ll either have to set aside until after getting a breast reduction or pass on to someone else.

Sexy, but made for large chests only. After looking at a few other reviews, I decided to try this dress a try in a size larger than normal as others were stating that it fits very small. I am 5' 8.5", a 39 hips and 29 waist. I purchased a size large and I think it fits beautifully...mostly. I am a 36 B or C, and you can see in the pictures that there's a lot of extra fabric up in the chest area to the point that the dress just doesn't fit well. I imagine if I took it to a seamstress they could somehow adjust that area down for me, but I truly believe it would fit better on somebody with a D cup chest. It is truly a stunning dress, but keeping it as it is I could only wear it with a coat or maybe a scarf around my shoulders to hide that area. I might try padding my bra with some of those extra cups from a bikini top just to make it work, because I love it otherwise!

Absolutely perfect for our beach wedding After many years of being together, we decided to get married on the beach during an upcoming trip to Florida. We planned our wedding 4 daysin advance. We had to arrange every, including buying my dress! Originally I ordered the Large. It was a bit too tight. It also didn't have the lace at the top as shown online. I then ordered the XL. It was made more like the online picture. It did not have cups sewn into the fabric like the Large did. That was fine with me. The XL was a bit too large so I altered it myself. The sheath underneath and the length of the dress was a good bit longer than the Large. I had to take in the sides of the top portion and the sides of the lace of the skirt. For the money, this dress is very pretty! And, it is really comfortable. It's very stretchy. I'm really happy with it. I'm 5'4 and weigh 148. I have a very straight body and not many curves. Generally, I wear a size 10 in most clothes. Sometimes I wear a 12 in a dress due to my bust size (38D). The dress is of decent quality, especially considering the cost. I'm very glad I bought it. Both dresses arrived the day after I ordered them. I'm adding a picture of our wedding. The dress was perfect. I received a lot of compliments on it when I sent the picture to my friends.

I loved it!!❤️ After not being able to make up my mind, I ordered my dress at the last minute for my brother’s wedding. “I literally tried my dress on for the 1st time, one day before the wedding!”😅 I ordered a small, “omg” was I pushing it, I thought. I decided to post, bc bf I decided to buy I was so leery, due to not being able to see anyone my size in the reviews. Beautiful!! I love it!! After reading a bunch of reviews on this dress, I was skeptical because on some it looked SUPER short, and of course, I didn’t know what it would really look like on my body type. Not many (if any) people had the chest that I have (38DDD), and I was unsure of how it would pull up there! As you can see, I personally think it looks fabulous! I love that it’s not form-fitting, it flows and hangs just right, and hides my stomach! I love the one-arm thing, but also, because of my larger chest, I can’t NOT wear a bra, so I just took the one strap down and tucked it in. I’m only 5’0-5’1, 170 lbs., and I think that’s the (main) reason it’s longer on me than on taller folks. Have no idea what it would do to taller people! I personally don’t mind the top “neck” area, and I think it hangs right. I don’t notice any of the “pulling” that some people claimed along the neck-line. These photos are of me just trying it on for the first time, and I plan on wearing it later, so I’ll update this if anything goes wrong! I also plan on ironing it, as you can tell it needs it, right out of the package! Fabric is light-weight, and in this 100°+ weather, I’m hoping it’s not too hot! Anyway, so far, so good!!! Will update if anything goes wrong or happens while wearing it! Recommend!

It is very flattering and it shows off the small part of my waist and helps hide my post momma belly. I would suggest a slip and I hope this review helps someone.

Great dress for the price. After trying on a gazillion dresses for a formal wedding (from just about every physical store and Amazon too), I ended up with this very reasonably-priced dress at the last minute. I am 61, 5’1” and weigh 135. I can’t seem to get used to the fact that I’m not 35 and 110lbs anymore, so dress-shopping for a belly that makes me go up in size while all other areas remain the same is a very emotionally draining event for me and makes it super hard to find anything that doesn’t need $200 in alterations. This dress is a medium and fit perfectly everywhere; it was super flattering and slimming. However, because of my height, it was more of a gown than a high-low dress. Which actually worked for the event we were at! At this price, would highly recommend it. Took off a star because the zipper was a little wonky at the waistline and the underarm area was a tiny bit low for my taste, but other than that, you really can’t go wrong.

Great purchase! After two days of shopping in Charlotte for a dress for my sister’s wedding, I was frustrated. I got on Amazon and ordered four dresses. This one fit perfectly! It was exactly what I was looking for. I usually wear a L in dresses, but ordered an XL. Great fit. For reference, I am a 38 D. I generally wear a L top and 12 in pants. This dress zips up the back and has some stretch. It was very comfortable to move and dance in all night.

Good value for sequined, lined, full-length gown Alex Evening's size 16 Petite fits me, but dresses are rarely available in that size. When available, they often cost more than the same style in a regular size. My measurements are 46-40-46, 5'3". I tried this style 16 Petite. I think it needs to be taken in at the shoulders or something. I don't like that you can see my bra in the right armhole, probably because I'm holding my arm out to take the selfies. Fabric is mid- to heavy-weight and comfortable. Dress is fully lined. The sequined, corded, and embroidered pattern seems designed to hide body "imperfections" and to minimize chafing under the arms. I can't write about durability because I just got it, but it seems very well-made. Ice sage color matches picture. The "shawl" is just a big rectangle 18" x 70" of chiffon--no beading, bit nicely finished with a loop for hanging. It also has a large manufacturer's label near one end that would need to be removed with care to avoid damaging the fabric. It is a lovely mother of the bride or groom gown!

Does the job, very finicky for the right tie Alright so here it goes… first of all, for a dress I am most likely only ever gonna wear once, it does the job, is cheap, and looks decent in photos. (In the photo, left is a plus size and right is the regular size.) With that being said, if you are purchasing this dress for a bridesmaid dress here are somethings to consider…. Although you can very easily YouTube how to tie the dress and you don’t need someone practiced in tying this dress to help you - depending on the tie, you may be constantly readjusting your dress. The across the shoulder style was rough for both plus and regular size girl, and were both constantly readjusting. Both ended up immediately tying the dress differently for the reception pictured 2nd and 3rd (bonus for offering different looks) At 5’6, the girl who was in the plus size - with heels her dress was just a wee bit short (can’t see super well in the photos) so keep that in mind for our tall queens. All in all, for a one occasion wear, this does the trick with staying under $70. If you want to be super comfy and not worrying about having to pull at your dress all night - this ain’t it… or any infinity dress for that matter. Hope this helps yall!

A Picture Says A Thousand Words 5 Amazon Review This dress is a winner. I absolutely love it! I am a confident woman and this dress met my expectations. I am 5' 4.5" and 140 lbs. I wore a medium with a 2.5" heel and it was perfect length. I read the reviews and carefully considered how I would approach it. I purchased with thought because the event I would attend would have over 300 couples for a Valentine's Day Sweetheart Retreat. I knew that someone else may show up in this dress, I didn't mind (especially since I ordered from this source with over 1400 reviews, not counting those who may not do a review) just in case, I wanted to be different. Guess what? You guessed it, two other ladies had on the same dress, in the same color. They were taller and bigger, so it didn't fit them, like mines fit me. I accessorized heavy and they didn't. I added a black mermaid petticoat, a black bridal belt, in which my seamstress cut the ribbon to shorten it and added a clip. Also, she made me a satin wrap (which gave me options). I wore my silver pumps, crystal tear drop necklace with an older pair of earrings. I was called a Princess (maybe because my father is the King🙌🏾 ). I hope this helps you. Blessings.... This is my Amazon shopping list: black mermaid petticoat Bridal belt Silver patent pumps Crystal tear drop set (I wore the necklace only with a different pair of earrings).

Perfect for a 20’s Holiday Party An excellent dress for a themed holiday party I’m going to! I styled it with other products I found on Amazon and think it’ll be a hit of an ensemble. I will say the color looked bright red right out of the bag but once I put it on it looked a bit more maroon/burgundy. It’s still a bit brighter than expected but still gorgeous. The beading seems sturdy (I initially zipped it up but then pulled it off over my head since there was some stretch). The gloves fit great too! I’m a bit on the bigger side and worried they’d be tight but I think I’ll be comfortable in them all night, no circulation worries whatsoever.

Another nice dress. Bought 14, usually a size 12 at 5'4 175lbs. I purchased the champagne color, need to take it in on the sides; doesn't synch the waist as the picture does.

Pretty dress, great color Another very incorrect size chart, but this one was so off that I just went ahead and ordered my usual size (large) and in spite of the chart indicating that it'd be way too small, it was actually a little big. I'm 5'4" and I think this dress is for taller women. On me, the bodice bagged at my sides and the ruffles just felt like too much fabric. I love wrap dresses and usually find them to be flattering on my hourglass shape, but the ruffles added too much volume and made the dress unflattering. It's a well made dress and the fabric feels nice against the skin. Just not right for me. Recommended for taller people whose frames can handle all of the extra fabric.

Felt like an absolute knockout in this dress💃 – highlights curves, sexy ruffle side split … ANRABESS Sleeveless Bodycon Ruffle Side Split Long Dress I felt like an absolute knockout in this dress! This dress features a sleeveless design that accentuates the shoulders and arms, and a bodycon fit that highlights curves. This dress was designed to fit snugly. The ruffle side split adds a touch more of sexy to the dress, while the maxi length gives it a classic and sophisticated look. The dress is made from a high-quality fabric that is comfortable and breathable, ensuring that you can wear it all night without feeling uncomfortable. The material is also stretchy, which makes it easy to move around. This dress was so close to perfection. There were two minor flaws, but they are definitely not dealbreakers. First, I wish the straps were a touch shorter or adjustable. Second, the cut of the top is a little awkward - it’s a little loose around the cleavage. I don’t know if that is on purpose. Also, there is a gap of the material on the right side of the chest (where you can clearly see my bra), but since it’s also black it blends. I absolutely love the design of this dress. Although the top may not fit perfectly for everyone, the dress is a great addition to any wardrobe for formal occasions. (For reference, I am 5'8" and 125 lbs, with an athletic build, and my current measurements are bust 35.5, underbust 29 inches, 28.5 inches for my waist, and 37.5 inches for my hips. I went with a size small and I think that was the best size choice for me.) 4.8 stars

Appealing and curve hugging, this dress won’t disappoint if you’re looking for that wow factor. The neckline is a nice asymmetrical design that adds interest and flare to this piece. The ruching is a nice touch and forgiving of the midsection. This is a form fitted dress, it does tend to rise up. It does have a slit in the back making walking easy. The back zipper can be difficult to close on your own and keep in mind your complexion should you choose this color camel like I did. As you can see, it is close to my own skin tone and can give the illusion that you’re not wearing anything at all! Very SATC Carrie Bradshaw and The Naked Dress!! A (black) blazer is suggested should you choose to wear this (color) dress to the workplace. Age 46. Weight 135lbs. Height 5’5”. Size Small. Color Camel.

Are these pants giving welcome to Jurassic Park? Yes, but am I also falling in love with the vibe also yes. I am in between sizes so I when with the XXL short because I’m 5’5 and hate my pants to drag on the ground. I wish they were just 1/2 bigger and highwaisted. Apart from that I’m loving them.

Sexy AND flattering! Army green on the left. Dark green on the right. The army green is nothing like what was pictured on here so I will be returning but I love the dark green. This dress is amazing I am so happy with it. If you’re someone who has a belly and a flat booty this is the dress for you. It is SO flattering I don’t even need shapewear, yet I still feel sexy because it shows off my legs. I will be wearing shorts underneath because it is pretty short. And I will have to pin the front because it is so low chested which I’ve heard a lot of others had to do too. I got an xl and it fits perfect. I’m 5’4” about 180-190

Solid Buy Arrived surprisingly quickly. I had gone through the reviews and found someone who was a similar size/shape to myself, and went with the size that worked for them. I’m glad I did! I’m 160lbs, 5’3”, 34DD, 31” waist, 40” hips. Women’s clothing is so hard to gauge for sizing. Depending on the department, I’m anywhere from a S to an XL, the average being a M/L. The customer’s review that I went off of, had purchased a M. The fabric is a flowy, breathable velvet. I actually really like this dress for my body type. A lot of clothing clings in the wrong areas, but this dress is rather flattering. This dress is not a faux rap - it is a true wrap. As you can see, there's not a huge difference in the bust snap being open or closed. I will be painting it black just for subtleties, that way I can wear it to be more open or closed and it be less noticeable.

The material is thicker so it doesn’t feel cheap, nor does it look it! Highly recommend if you’re looking for a nice dress!

So flattering! As a mother of three this dress was so flattering on my body! I loved it. I got so many compliments on this dress it fit perfectly. I am 5’2 and it was a good length. Definitely get a seamless bra! Such good quality for the price! I loved this dress!
beautiful dress and color!! as a red head this cognac/copper color is amazing! fits nicely and is surprising long for someone 6'1. love the back too!
beautiful dress and color!! as a red head this cognac/copper color is amazing! fits nicely and is surprising long for someone 6'1. love the back too!

OK for petite As an elder millennial my go to pant style has been slim or skinny, so I decided to try the current looser trouser pant trend and bought these in xs short in mocha. I'm glad I did! The quality is pretty good for price (got it on prime day) and the style is nice. My only concern, which is very specific to me - it's VERY hard to shop my size as I'm 4'9" and about 95 lbs. I'm extra petite. Rarely anything fits me perfect. The wide leg and pleats do kind of overwhelm me. But... I also feel I can pull it off as long as the rest of my outfit/top is fitted to counterbalance. Just take a look at the pics and you'll see yourself. I got the short length and while it should hit my ankle its full length on me and even when I'm wearing 2.5 inch heels (again, see pic). So, while my purchase isn't a miss, it's not perfect hit either but that's cause of my size. I'm still going to qear the pants tho! :)

Comfortable and well made As it came out of the box this dress was a little wrinkled, which is to be expected. I could have steamed the wrinkles out for the picture that accompanies this review, but didn't so you can see what to expect. I asked my model to try it on and tell me what she thought. "I like it," she told me. It's comfortable and it fits well. Do you mind if I put your picture in the review? "That would be fine." For reference, I ordered a size Small. She is 5'4" tall and 100 pounds. It was a perfect fit for her.

Great dress As most people are, I'm always nervous about buying clothes on line, and I was really nervous about this dress because I NEEDED it to be perfect, and it was!!! I'm 5'7" and approx 230lbs, and normally wear an XL, but I r3ad the reviews about sizing up, so I got the 2xl and it fit like a glove. The material is comfortable, and feels like it's great quality. So happy with my purchase!

As short/petite at 5' and 150lbs, I bought the size 12 for my hips so it was a little big in the shoulders so appears to be true size 12. I cut off 7" from the bottom carefully cutting around the beading/sequins and tacking them up on the inside. It was a very pretty dress for a dim evening event.
Great fit! As someone that is tall (also 5’10”) length is always a concern for me. This dress fit great, super light and so comfortable. Unfortunately not as dressy as I needed for the event.

Checked all my boxes As someone who has a really hard time finding and spending money on clothes, I felt cute and beautiful in this dress. The neckline was flattering, the sleeves are able to cover the biggest parts of my arms, and the dress didn’t show off my stomach. Note: the sleeves are held in place by elastic and did tend to move around a bit. I am 5’11”, 196 pounds, with a 43 chest and 36 waist. I went with the XL, but I probably could have gotten a large. The fabric is quite thick and had a lot of stretch (almost like a scuba suit?) The dress had some, but not a crazy amount, of wrinkles out of the box. I paired it with a petticoat and a black cinch belt. When my sister saw me in the dress, (she is a similar build to me) she said she wanted one too. Bonus: if you want to Disney-bound Ursula, the purple version of this dress would be great for it.

Nice Dress As soon as I put the dress on, i see it had two small holes. I couldn’t return it because my event was that night. I sewed it up and wore it. Other than that, it fit great. The material is soft. I ordered a large and I am 5’6, 218lbs.
Perfect Dress As soon as my dress arrived. I took it out and tried it on. I weigh 173, I'm 5 feet even and I purchased a LARGE and the dress fits perfect! Glad I made this purchase.

Great for the price As the reviews say, yes is a bit see through, it will not give you shape wear kind of control. For reference I’m 5’2” and with 6 “ heels on it will touch the floor. This is a aize medium, my hips are 42”, is fitted not tight. Hope this helps.

High quality, great stretch, comfortable As you can see I’m pregnant, I was looking for a dress I could buy and possibly use again after I give birth & this was perfect. I was a size small before pregnancy & purchased a small & medium to try both & went with the medium. The small would have worked but was a bit tight around my hips/ butt due to my stomach. Also medium provides a better length. It’s got great stretch & isn’t sheer at all. It is supportive but not restrictive (may be able to skip a bra & wear pasties like I was able to) so I was comfortable all night at a wedding, sitting & standing. I’m 149 now but was 134 before pregnancy & mostly have gained in my tummy. I’m 36 C/D bra, 5’6.5” & hips are 38” or so. Hope that helps. :) Im picky with material & quality, this could have easily been purchased at Bloomingdales or Nordstrom & I think you’ll love it & it’ll become a great closet staple.
Loooove As you can see I'm tiny. I have trouble with things fitting me. This fit! I did not have to do any adjustments! I am 411, 95 lbs. It fit so well!

NOT THE DRESS THAT IS ADVERTISED As you can see, the dress is quite different from the product image. In the product image, the bra area is much straighter and looks sturdy but the actual dress has a deep cut and the straps do not adjust AT ALL. Secondly, I was hoping for a minimal floral pattern like in the image but instead this dress had flowers all the way down. Lastly, the material turned slightly white in the areas where it was stretched. Amazon sent me a new dress when I advised them of the inconsistencies but the second dress they sent wasn’t any different from the first. Overall, it’s not a terrible dress but it’s just not the dress from the product image and I just can’t get past that. For reference, I’m 5’1, 130lbs, 32DD and ordered a small.

GORGEOUS, I FEEL LIKE A GODDESS! & i found a 2nd way to wear it? As you may have guessed it is very long. I am 5'2 & wear an xs if it's available, otherwise a small. That's in everything. So I went with it for this dress. My feet are drowning in the extra fabric but then I put big heels on & there is still drag on the ground. That's OK tho I'll figure it out for the sake of this diamond of a dress! The part that hangs in the front on the chest over the floral, it is detached/movable. So I saw that under it is a pretty floral bra basically that you'd find on other dressed. I decided to try flipping the detached piece to the back and sure enough it worked as you can see in pictures 4 & 6. Now it's like a different dress because of the breast part! I hope you followed that, keep in mind. I don't think it's meant to change like that so I had to be SUPER CAREFUL when stepping into the dress & pulling it over my hips with that piece being in the back. I am very slim and not working with much in the back so it may not work for everyone like specifically the blessed girls with a big bty in the back. Again it's gorgeous. I see one in pink that I'm reallllly tempted to get but it is in a small instead of an xs. I don't think it'd be bad, im not sure if the length would be diff but most importantly I don't go anywhere special! It'll be a long time before I can wear this dress surely. But the pink one if it is still on vine after a while I'll prob give in because it looks so pretty in pink which wasn't available when I ordered this color. I have no regrets though. Yes pls get this dress if you like it & can afford it and with a special occasion I promise you will light up the room! Very unique from what I see usually.

As advertised At 220lbs, 44-37-46 and 5'6" the dress is a good fit with great stretch(put.on without using zipper). To be honest could probably have gotten away with a size down. Definitely an outfit for a night out with the amount of sparkle- will need to and wash. Fabric soft, not itchy and certainly not see through.Only thing I would change is the straps...the adjustable bra-like presentation does cheapen it a bit in my opinion.

Great shirt At 5'5 and 130 lbs, I got an XS. I know to get this rather than my typical size, S, based on my prior experience with buying office shirts on Amazon. They tend to run large. As you can see, the fit is really nice overall, although the sleeves are a tad wide and long. Not a biggie though. The fabric is great, you can tell it's mostly cotton and the color is spot on. Definitely recommend it!

Better than expected At first the dress material didn’t make me feel it was elegant enough but when I tried it on it was beautiful. Fast shipment. Beautiful dress. At the time of this picture, I was approximately 137lbs (and 5'1") and the size 8 fit perfectly. It was great for a formal outing.

Impressed 💕 At this point, it’s safe to say this is my all time favorite clothing brand on amazon😩 but anyways. I got this in size small. It’s true to size, I’m 5’3 and the length is perfect. The material is also really light weight, it’s not see through, it’s not too thin and not too thick, it’s very silky, it can be worn in the warm time or cold time and the quality is really good. Very comfortable dress Attended a gothic themed wedding and this dress was perfect. It has stretch and the fit was comfortable. I'm 5'4 around 145-150lbs and the large size fit great. It was long enough without being too long.

Very nice! Attended our annual Christmas party gathering and received many compliments. My husband really love the dress on me. The dress was a little heavy in weight but it was very comfortable never the less. For reference, ordered large for my 5’5 -180 lbs. Great party dress!
STUNNING ! Awesome dress! I got so many compliments. I’m 6’0 245lbs & I ordered a 2x. perfect fit. I wore the split in the back. Be advised the dress is see through.

Snug like a bug in a rug!! Babaaaay, I had a gala to attend for the Chambers of Commerce. No store had what I needed/ wanted so I decided to check out Amazon. I came across this dress and read the reviews. Keep in mind, I'm 5'11 and about 160lbs. The color was rich and the cut was perfect and had a mini train on the back. Thank you for making my night memorable 💖

Definitely can see straight in the dress lol Baby when i tell you this dress was everything! I felt all eyes on me lol . I ordered a xl and it was perfect ! I didn’t like the bottoms it came with but i still wore them anyway . Yall have to get this dress ! Im 5’2 so i had to hold the dress up because it was long

Party Ready Based on reviews that I read I purchased a size small. This fits great. It’s long and the material is flowing just like the pictures show. I will be wearing a belt with it to give a little shape. *UPDATE* Now that I’ve worn it for a prolonged period I would say to be aware of the neck. There is no give so that part of the outfit can become uncomfortable. The rest of the outfit is super comfy. Easy to move in. The legs are really long. They will drag. I am 5 foot 6 in and I had to be super careful with the heels I wore and when I wore sneakers it dragged and I stepped on the material. It was not white afterward but stains and dirt did wash out.
