Everything fits really well except the neckline is weird, the dress is the same front and back. I couldn't tell which was front or back and it looked exactly the same either way, The sides near my armpits were very strangely cut and where the shawl area was sewn was weird as well. Back to the drawing board for me. I gave it a 2 star instead of one because the material is nice, but the cut is strange.
Great quality dress! Beautiful & elegant. The quality is very good. Fit perfectly. I’m 5’9” and weight 170 lbs. Large was perfect. Highly recommend for a wedding guest dress.
Beautiful and classy. Loved the fabric. Was able to easily adjust the length for my 5’0” 100 lb daughter. We ordered small.

Perfect fit, cute dress! Has pockets! Beautiful color, stylish dress. Conservative but not frumpy at all. Shows off the positive qualities of my figure and minimizes the flaws. I have a very long torso and this dress actually shows off my waist, which is a nearly impossible feat on my physique with mass produced dresses. I think it would fit women with regular length and even short torsos too. I wore a wide belt, which further accentuated my waist. Fabric is thick enough not to show every bump but not heavy or hot. It has a great amount of stretch which makes it comfortable and allows me to move my arms freely without ripping the dress up the back like The Hulk. I have muscular arms and often find even short sleeves on garments far too tight and constricting. The sleeves on this dress were perfectly comfortable. Dress has pockets so I could keep my cell phone on me. The pocket size and placement somewhat concealed the bulk of the phone, maintaining a more streamlined look than some other pockets do. The back zipper is okay quality. I've seen better zippers, but I've seen many worse zippers, and even returned dresses for bad zippers. This dress would be appropriate for weddings, funerals, parties, church, office work, job interviews, and many other occasions. Different accessories would easily change the look. I plan to buy at least 1 more of these dresses because I like it so much. I'm very happy with my purchase. In case it helps, I'm currently about 173 pounds at just under 5'4." I always weigh more than I look like I do because of how my particular body is. I suspect that some other people my size might weigh about 165 pounds. Size Large fit me perfectly.

ATTENTION short ladies!!! Before buying this dress I was unable to find a single review regarding the length of the dress and how it fit without alterations/hemming, just a lot of people who had alterations done. So I am here to leave my vertically-challenged review if you are anything like me and sometimes do things at the last minute. This dress came in 3 days before a friend's wedding and thankfully, I was able to manage wear without needing it hemmed. I did not wear any heels as you can see and the dress was just fine, although I did have to pick it up a little when walking upstairs (I almost tripped over it when I didn't). I stand at the measley height of 5'3". If I'd had it hemmed then I would've maybe only had an inch to 1.5 inches hemmed, so if you're worried it'll be too long, try not to stress about it, unless you're even shorter than me. Then, it might be worth having it hemmed. All in all, it was a lovely dress with good quality material. I loved the versatility of making the neck line any style you want to wear. I went with tying it in a halter style because it compliments my shoulders.

Before I ordered the dress I had read through a lot of reviews to see how the dress fits in order to determine what size I should order. I read a ton of mixed responses, quite a bit saying the dress fit bigger than how the sizes normally fit; however, I did not experience this at all. The dress fit PERFECT and very true to size! I was actually shocked at how well the dress fit. I wear a size 6 dress normally, but my measurements (based on their size guide) were all over the place. It said I was a size 4 in upper measurements and like a 10 in lower measurements such as my hips. Since I was having such a hard time with the sizing, I decided to just order my normal size (which is a 6) and I would just get alterations if needed. So from my experience, order your normal dress size and hopefully you will be just as pleased as I am! Just in case someone needs a general idea of how the size 6 fits, my height is 5'4 and my weight is 122 lbs. My bra size is a 32B and my hips are definitely "child bearing" hips! LOL

Petticoat almost required Bought size large based on the size chart. I am 5 foot 6 inches and 162 lbs. I love the look of this dress. The pattern is as depicted and the length is just right. The one thing you need to remember is that as stated, this dress is polyester. So it's light, but does not breathe well. I am a curvy girl. I do not have a boxy figure, but because of the cut of this dress and the way the waistband hits on me, I feel that without a petticoat (which my mom happened to have and let me keep) this dress falls a little flat. In the pictures I have given, the first one with the green headband around my wrist is without a petticoat, and the second one is with a petticoat. My only other possible complaints are that I wish the sleeves were a bit more fitted at the bottom and I wish that the neckline was a little more open.

Simple, Beautiful, Elegant Bought this as a bride to be; we’re planning a casual sundress type celebration as opposed to anything overly fancy, but I have had this dress in my list for years and it didn’t disappoint. First, this is actually true to size. I am 5’0”, 145lbs on a good day, and I’m always afraid to buy a medium because some brands too small, but then a large will run way too big. I got the medium, and I feel like I have room to move around without compromising the shape of the dress, which hugs the right places but isn’t tight on any curves. The low part of the dress does just barely sweep the ground behind me without heels, so I added a 1.5 inch and it’s perfect for me. The zipper and all the materials definitely seem quality on this dress. Highly recommend.

Sexyyyyy and Classy Don't PUT THE DRESS ON BACKWARDS..soo many pple are putting the dress on backwards bc theres no tag inside. The top piece (over your breast) should be smooth..the ruche part goes on your back. Look closely at the dress on model. I'm 5'6" approx 255.. I ordered XL. I have double tummy but the ruche assisted w a lil camouflage. The back can ruche as well. In the 2nd pic (sideview) u can see my 2tummy even more but im glad you all can see the realness of how this dress will show ALL of ur curves! The price was beyond right. Some pple said they had an issue with the boob area of the dress and u can see I didn't put that flap piece over my boob.. Maybe they were putting it on backwards as the dress has NO TAG ..so I matched it up w the model..the ruche (top piece) part goes in the back. Stretchy cute and sexy..hope this help!
